```{r, eval = T}
# function to get non redundant motifs from MotifDB
getNonRedundantMotifs <- function(){
  motifs <- MotifDb::query(MotifDb::MotifDb, c("Mmusculus","HOCOMOCO"))
  modf <- data.frame(row.names=names(motifs),
                     TF=gsub("^Mmusculus-HOCOMOCOv10-|_MOUSE.+","",names(motifs)),
                     grade=gsub(".+\\.","",names(motifs)))
  modf <- modf[order(modf$TF,modf$grade),]
  modf <- modf[!duplicated(modf$TF),]
  setNames(universalmotif::convert_motifs(motifs[row.names(modf)]), modf$TF)
}
motifs <- getNonRedundantMotifs()
motifs$GCR
```

```{r}
library(UpSetR)

regionUpset2 <- function (x = NULL, genelist = NULL, returnList = FALSE, ...) 
{
    if (!is.null(genelist)) {
        x <- genelist
    }
    if (is.character(x)) 
        x <- as.list(x)
    stopifnot(length(x) > 1)
    if (is.list(x)) {
        if (is.null(names(x)) && all(unlist(lapply(x, is.character))) && 
            all(lengths(x) == 1)) 
            names(x) <- unlist(x)
        if (any(unlist(lapply(x, FUN = function(x) {
            if (is.character(x)) {
                if (length(x) != 0) return(TRUE)
                if (!file.exists(x)) return(TRUE)
            }
            FALSE
        })))) {
            stop("`x` should be a named list of character vectors.")
        }
    }
    x <- lapply(x, function(x) as.character(x))
    if (returnList) 
        return(x)
    UpSetR::upset(UpSetR::fromList(x), ...)
}
```
# Fig 1A - Motif enrichment sperm and oocyte

Sperm peaks
```{r}
d.sperm <- readRDS("objects/motif_enrichment_sperm_consensus_narrow.rds")
d.sperm <- readRDS("objects/motif_enrichment_sperm_consensus_broad.rds")

head(d.sperm)
length(d.sperm$motif_id)#281
```

MII oocyte peaks
```{r}
d.oo <- readRDS("objects/motif_enrichment_oocyte_broad.rds")

head(d.oo)
length(d.oo$motif_id)
d.oo$motif_id
```

Comparing the enrichments directly, e.g. by merging two data.frames and plotting the log(p) in one vs the other highlighting top 5 for each 
```{r}
m <- merge(d.oo, d.sperm, by="motif_id", suffixes=c(".oocyte",".sperm"))

m.oo.sort <- m[order(m[,2],decreasing = FALSE),]
m.oo5 <- m.oo.sort[1:5,]
m.sperm.sort <- m[order(m[,18],decreasing = FALSE),]
m.sperm5 <- m.sperm.sort[1:5,]
m
```

```{r}
ggplot(m, aes(x=log2((1+tp.sperm)/(1+fp.sperm)), y= log2((1+tp.oocyte)/(1+fp.oocyte)), size=(tp_percent.sperm))) + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_text_repel(box.padding=0.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 10, hjust = "left", aes(label=motif_id), data=m.oo5, size=4) + 
  geom_text_repel(box.padding= 0.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 10, hjust = "right", aes(label=motif_id), data=m.sperm5)+
  geom_point(color="orange", data=m.oo5) +
  geom_point(color="blue", data=m.sperm5) +
  labs(color="Top enriched motifs")+
  labs(x="log2(fold-enrichment in spermatozoa)", y="log2(fold-enrichment in MII oocytes)", size="% of set") +
  #ylab("-log10 (adjusted p-value MII oocyte)")+
  #xlab("-log10 (adjusted p-value spermatozoa)")+
  theme_classic() +
  #theme(legend.position = "none")+
  ggtitle("Top ranked motifs in peaks of spermatozoa vs. MII oocytes")

  ggsave("./plots/Fig1A_motif_enrichment_sperm_vs_oocyte_peaks.svg")
ggsave("./plots/Fig1A_motif_enrichment_sperm_vs_oocyte_peaks.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("./plots/Fig1A_motif_enrichment_sperm_vs_oocyte_peaks.png")
```


# Fig 1B - TF motif activity sperm vs oocyte

```{r}
library(TFBSTools)
sc <- readRDS("./objects/sc_sperm_oo.rds")
fa <- Rsamtools::FaFile("objects/Mus_musculus.GRCm39.dna_sm.primary_assembly.fa")

sc_gc <- addGCBias(sc, genome=fa)
motifs <- do.call(what = "PFMatrixList", lapply(getNonRedundantMotifs(), class="TFBSTools-PFMatrix", FUN= convert_motifs))
#motifs <- getNonRedundantMotifs()
motif_ix <- motifmatchr::matchMotifs(motifs, sc_gc, genome=fa)
motif_ix
dev <- computeDeviations(object=sc_gc, annotations=motif_ix)
dev$groups <- c("sperm","sperm","MIIoocyte")

fit <- lmFit(assays(dev)$z, model.matrix(~dev$groups),background_peaks = getBackgroundPeaks(sc_gc,rowData(sc_gc)$bias,niterations = 5000))

head(mores <- topTable(eBayes(fit),number=Inf),395)
sechm::sechm(dev, head(row.names(mores)), assayName = "z", top_annotation = "groups",do.scale=TRUE)
sechm::sechm(dev, head(row.names(mores),395), assayName = "z", top_annotation = "groups",do.scale = TRUE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(mores, aes(logFC, -log10(adj.P.Val))) + 
  geom_point() + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed") +
  ggtitle("Transcription factor motif activity spermatozoa vs MIIoocyte") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(y = "-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
  geom_text_repel(data = subset(mores, adj.P.Val < 0.01), 
                  aes(label = rownames(subset(mores, adj.P.Val < 0.01))), 
                  min.segment.length = 0,
                  size = 4)
#geom_point(aes(color = B)) +

ggsave("./plots/Fig1B_TFmotif_activity_sperm_vs_oocyte_peaks.svg")
ggsave("./plots/Fig1B_TFmotif_activity_sperm_vs_oocyte_peaks.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("./plots/Fig1B_TFmotif_activity_sperm_vs_oocyte_peaks.png")
```




# Fig 1C - Human sperm 

```{r}
genome <- ah[["AH90808"]] #human 

GRE_motif <- MotifDb::MotifDb %>% 
  MotifDb::query("GRE") %>% 
  universalmotif::convert_motifs() %>% 
  .[[1]]
```

```{r GRE-peaks-hcp}
peaks <- import("extern_data/ATAC_Corces_1_peaks.narrowPeak")
peak_seqs <- get_sequence(peaks, genome)
fimo <- runFimo(peak_seqs, GRE_motif, meme_path = "/common/meme/bin") # you need to insert your indiviudual meme path here
GRE_peaks1 <- peaks[overlapsAny(peaks, fimo)]
```
```{r number-peaks-hcp, results='hide'}
length(peaks) #32027
length(fimo) #1338
sum(overlapsAny(peaks, fimo)) #716
length(GRE_peaks1) #716
```

```{r, eval=T}
tracks <- c(
  sperm1="extern_data/ATAC_Corces_1.full.bw",
  sperm2="extern_data/ATAC_Corces_2.full.bw"
)

m <- signal2Matrix(tracks, GRE_peaks1, w = 20, BPPARAM = 4)
m <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(m)

fused_sperm_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[1:2])
fused_sperm_mat

fused_m <- c(list("Human sperm"=fused_sperm_mat), m[-1:-2])


pdf("plots/Fig1C_humansperm.pdf", width=7.5, height=10)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_m, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_trim = TRUE, mean_color = "#800080", heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL), use_raster = TRUE)
print(h)
dev.off()

png("plots/Fig1C_humansperm.png")
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_m, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080", heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL), use_raster = TRUE)
print(h)
dev.off()

svg("plots/Fig1C_humansperm.svg", width=7.5, height=10)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_m, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080",heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL), use_raster = TRUE)
print(h)
dev.off()
```


# Fig 1D - Sperm GRE peaks across spermatogenesis

```{r}
tracks <- c(
  uds1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_Thy1posSpermatogonia_GSM2751121.bw",
  uds2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_Thy1posSpermatogonia_GSM2751122.bw",
  ds1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_cKitposSpermatogonia_GSM2751125.bw",
  ds2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_cKitposSpermatogonia_GSM2751126.bw",
  ps1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_PachytenSpermatocytes_GSM2751129.bw",
  ps2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_PachytenSpermatocytes_GSM2751130.bw",
  rs1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_RoundSpermatides_GSM2751133.bw",
  rs2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_RoundSpermatides_GSM2751134.bw",
  sperm1="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262855.bw",
  sperm2="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262856.bw",
  sperm3="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088377.bw",
  sperm4="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088378.bw",
  GVoocyte1="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_GVOocyte_GSM3262861.bw",
  GVoocyte2="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_GVOocyte_GSM3262862.bw",
  "MII oocyte"="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_MIIOocyte_GSM3262863.bw"
)
```



```{r}
peaks <- readRDS("objects/narrow_peaks_with_GRE_sperm.rds")
m <- signal2Matrix(tracks, peaks, w = 20, BPPARAM = 2)
m <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(m)

fused_uds_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[1:2])
fused_ds_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[3:4])
fused_ps_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[5:6])
fused_rs_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[7:8])
fused_sperm_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[9:12])
fused_gv_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[13:14])

fused_m <- c(list(fused_uds=fused_uds_mat), list(fused_ds=fused_ds_mat), list(fused_ps=fused_ps_mat), list(fused_rs=fused_rs_mat), list(fused_sperm=fused_sperm_mat), list(fused_GVoocytes=fused_gv_mat), m[15], m[-1:-15])
fused_n <- renormalizeBorders(lapply(fused_m,log1p))


```

Combined in one plot
```{r}
pdf("plots/Fig1D_GREpeaks_from_sperm_across_spermatogenesis_normalized.pdf", width=17.5, height=10)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_n, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080")
print(h)
dev.off()

png("plots/Fig1D_GREpeaks_from_sperm_across_spermatogenesis_normalized.png", height=768)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_n, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080")
print(h)
dev.off()
```

Single panels of heatmaps 
```{r}
# Create a list of heatmaps
for (i in 1:length(fused_n)) {
  h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_n[i], raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080",
                            heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL))
  
  # Save each heatmap to a PDF
  pdf(paste0("plots/Fig1D_GREpeaks_from_sperm_across_spermatogenesis_normalized_", i, ".pdf"), width=2.5, height=10)
  draw(h, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
# Create a list of heatmaps
for (i in 1:length(fused_n)) {
  h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_n[i], raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080",
                            heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.4, "npc"), title=NULL))

  # Save each heatmap to a PNG
  png(paste0("plots/Fig1D_GREpeaks_from_sperm_across_spermatogenesis_normalized_", i, ".png"), width=250, height=768)
  draw(h, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
  })
```


promoters regions with GRE 
```{r}
proms <- readRDS("objects/GRE_promoters_center.rds")

```

```{r}
sm2 <- signal2Matrix(w = 20L, filepaths = tracks[c(1:4,5:9)],regions = proms)
#plotEnrichedHeatmaps(sm2)
```


```{r}
sm_5mC <- signal2Matrix(w = 20L , smooth = T, limit = c(0,100), filepaths = methyl_bed, regions = proms)
sm2 <- sm2[rownames(sm2) %in% rownames(sm_5mC),]
```




```{r}
sm_merge <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm2)[1:4])
sm_merge_H3K4me3 <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm2)[5:9])
sm_merge_5mC <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_5mC)[1:2])
```

```{r}
p <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(ml = list(ATAC = sm_merge,H3K4me3 = sm_merge_H3K4me3),multiScale = F,row_title = "Promoters with GRE",color = rocket(2000),scale_title = "density",axis_name = c("-2kb","TSS","+2kb"), use_raster = T,mean_scale_side = "none",  heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.4,"npc"), title=NULL))+

  png(paste0("plots/Fig1E.png"), width=750, height=768)

  dev.off()
  
  pdf(paste0("plots/Fig1E.pdf"), width=7.5, height=10)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  svg(paste0("plots/Fig1E.svg"), width=7.5, height=10)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
```

# Fig 1F GR-ChIP 
```{r}


bw <- list.files(path = "intern_data/ChIP/",pattern = "*.bw$",full.names = T)
names(bw) <- basename(bw)

bw <- bw[!grepl(pattern = "Input|Stress",bw)]




GR_bed <- sapply(names(bw),function(names){
  import.bw(bw[names])
})


```

import peaks
```{r}
se <- readRDS("intern_data/ChIP/GR_counts_non_resized.SE.rds")


GRpeaks <- granges(se)
```

```{r}
sm_GR <-  signal2Matrix(filepaths = GR_bed,regions = GRpeaks,w = 10L,smooth = T, background= 0)
sm_merge_GR <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_GR))
```


```{r,fig.width=7,fig.height=9}

p_GR1 <-  plotEnrichedHeatmaps(sm_merge_GR,row_title = "GR-ChIP sites",scale_title = "GR\ndesnity",colors = mako(2000), raster_resize_mat = TRUE, use_raster = TRUE,axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), trim = c(0.01,0.99),width = unit(0.8,"npc"), heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.4,"npc"), title=NULL))



  draw(p_GR1, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")

  png(paste0("plots/Fig1F.png"), width=250, height=768)
  draw(p_GR1, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  pdf(paste0("plots/Fig1F.pdf"), width=2.5, height=10)
  draw(p_GR1, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  svg(paste0("plots/Fig1F.svg"), width=2.5, height=10)
  draw(p_GR1, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
```



# Fig 1G Promoter with GRE GR,ATAC,H3K4m3,H3k27ac
```{r}
tracks <- c(
  
  sperm1_H3K4me3="extern_data/SRR3309386.bw",
  sperm2_H3K4me3="extern_data/SRR3309387.bw",
  sperm3_H3K4me3="extern_data/SRR3703039.bw",
  sperm4_H3K4me3="extern_data/SRR5049005.bw",
  sperm5_H3K4me3="extern_data/SRR3225849.bw",
  sperm1_H3K27ac="extern_data/SRR3225845.bw",
  sperm2_H3K27ac="extern_data/SRR5049001.bw",
  sperm1="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262855.bw",
  sperm2="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262856.bw",
  sperm3="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088377.bw",
  sperm4="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088378.bw"

)


proms <- readRDS("objects/GRE_promoters_center.rds")
set.seed(1234)
#proms <- sample(proms,10000)

m <- signal2Matrix(tracks, proms, w = 20, BPPARAM = 8)
m <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(m)



fused_H3K4me3 <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[1:5])
fused_H3K27ac <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[6:7])
fused_ATAC <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[8:11])


fused_m <- c(list(list(H3K27ac=fused_H3K27ac), list(H3K4me3=fused_H3K4me3),list(ATAC=fused_ATAC)))
# fused_n <- renormalizeBorders(lapply(fused_m,log1p))


bg_nf <- getNormFactors(tracks,method = "background")


bg <- epiwraps::renormalizeSignalMatrices(ml = m ,scaleFactors = bg_nf)



fused_H3K4me3_bg <- mergeSignalMatrices(bg[1:5])
fused_H3K27ac_bg <- mergeSignalMatrices(bg[6:7])
fused_ATAC_bg <- mergeSignalMatrices(bg[8:11])
fused_bg <- c(list(H3K27ac=fused_H3K27ac_bg), list(H3K4me3=fused_H3K4me3_bg), list(ATAC = fused_ATAC_bg))
 

```



```{r}

sm_gr_smooth <- signal2Matrix(filepaths = GR_bed,regions = proms,w = 20L,smooth  = T,background = 0)
sm_gr_smooth <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_gr_smooth))


```


```{r}
plotEnrichedHeatmaps(sm_gr_smooth,row_title = "Promoter with GRE",scale_title = "GR\ndesnity",colors = mako(2000),mean_scale_side = "none", trim = c(0.02,0.98),
                            heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL))+
plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_bg,row_title = "Promoter with GRE",scale_title = "HPTM\ndensity",colors = rocket(2000),mean_scale_side = "none",
                            heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL),scale_rows = FALSE)
```

#Fig S1A - Comparison sperm data of published data and of Fischer and Kretschmer 2023

```{r}
peaks <- readRDS("objects/consensus.peaks_sperm.rds")
# GenomeInfoDb::seqinfo(peaks) <- "mm39"
tracks <- c(
  "Jung 1"="extern_data//ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262855.bw",
  "Jung 2"="extern_data//ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262856.bw",
  "Jung 3"="extern_data//ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088377.bw",
  "Jung 4"="extern_data//ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088378.bw",
  "Fischer 1"="extern_data/NoMx_N704_KG.bw",
  "Fischer 2"="extern_data/NoMx_N705_KG.bw"
)

m <- signal2Matrix(tracks, peaks, w = 20, BPPARAM = 4)
m <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(m)
n <- renormalizeBorders(lapply(m,log1p))

  pdf("sup_plots/FigS1A_sperm_comparisons.pdf", width=17.5, height=10)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(n, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_trim = TRUE)
print(h)
dev.off()

png("sup_plots/FigS1A_sperm_comparisons.png", height=768)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(n, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080")
print(h)
dev.off()
```



# Fig S1B A549 atac motif enrichment

sperm vs A549 enrichment

```{r}
d.sperm <- readRDS("objects/motif_enrichment_sperm_consensus_broad.rds")
d.a549 <- readRDS("objects/motif_enrichment_sperm_A549.rds")
m <- merge(d.a549, d.sperm, by="motif_id", suffixes=c(".a549",".sperm"))

m.a549.sort <- m[order(m[,2],decreasing = FALSE),]
m.a5495 <- m.a549.sort[1:3,]
m.sperm.sort <- m[order(m[,18],decreasing = FALSE),]
m.sperm5 <- m.sperm.sort[1:3,]
m

gr <- m.sperm.sort[2, ]
stat1 <- m.a549.sort[1, ]
```
```{r}
ggplot(m, aes(x=log2((1+tp.sperm)/(1+fp.sperm)), y= log2((1+tp.a549)/(1+fp.a549)), size=(tp_percent.sperm))) + 
  geom_point() + 

  geom_point(data=gr, color="orange")+
  geom_text_repel(box.padding=0.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 10,  nudge_x = 0.3, direction = "x", hjust = "right", aes(label=motif_id ), data= gr)+
  geom_point(data=stat1, color="blue")+
  geom_text_repel(box.padding=0.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 10,  nudge_y = 0.3, direction = "y", hjust = "right", aes(label=motif_id ), data= stat1)+

  labs(color="Top enriched motifs")+
  labs(x="log2(fold-enrichment in spermatozoa)", y="log2(fold-enrichment in A549)", size="% of set") +

  theme_classic() +

  ggtitle("Top ranked motifs in peaks of spermatozoa vs. A549")

ggsave("./sup_plots/FigS1B_motif_enrichment_sperm_vs_A549_peaks.svg")
ggsave("./sup_plots/FigS1B_motif_enrichment_sperm_vs_A549_peaks.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("./sup_plots/FigS1B_motif_enrichment_sperm_vs_A549_peaks.png")

```

# Fig S1C - Sperm GRE peaks not accessible in immature germ cells across spermatogenesis 

```{r}
tracks <- c(
  uds1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_Thy1posSpermatogonia_GSM2751121.bw",
  uds2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_Thy1posSpermatogonia_GSM2751122.bw",
  ds1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_cKitposSpermatogonia_GSM2751125.bw",
  ds2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_cKitposSpermatogonia_GSM2751126.bw",
  ps1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_PachytenSpermatocytes_GSM2751129.bw",
  ps2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_PachytenSpermatocytes_GSM2751130.bw",
  rs1="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_RoundSpermatides_GSM2751133.bw",
  rs2="extern_data/ATACse_PRJNA399533_RoundSpermatides_GSM2751134.bw",
  sperm1="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262855.bw",
  sperm2="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_Sperm_GSM3262856.bw",
  sperm3="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088377.bw",
  sperm4="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA315208_Sperm_GSM2088378.bw",
  GVoocyte1="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_GVOocyte_GSM3262861.bw",
  GVoocyte2="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_GVOocyte_GSM3262862.bw",
  "MII oocyte"="extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_MIIOocyte_GSM3262863.bw"
)
```

```{r}
peaks <- readRDS("./objects/narrow_overlaps_spermGRE_not_immatureGermCellsGRE.rds")
m <- signal2Matrix(tracks, peaks, w = 20, BPPARAM = 2)
m <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(m)

fused_uds_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[1:2])
fused_ds_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[3:4])
fused_ps_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[5:6])
fused_rs_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[7:8])
fused_sperm_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[9:12])
fused_gv_mat <- mergeSignalMatrices(m[13:14])

fused_m <- c(list(fused_uds=fused_uds_mat), list(fused_ds=fused_ds_mat), list(fused_ps=fused_ps_mat), list(fused_rs=fused_rs_mat), list(fused_sperm=fused_sperm_mat), list(fused_GVoocytes=fused_gv_mat), m[15], m[-1:-15])
fused_n <- renormalizeBorders(lapply(fused_m,log1p))


```

```{r}
pdf("sup_plots/FigS1C_GREpeaks_from_sperm_notimmature_across_spermatogenesis.pdf", width=17.5, height=10)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_m, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE \n not accessible in immature germ cells", raster_resize_mat = FALSE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080")
print(h)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
png("sup_plots/FigS1C_GREpeaks_from_sperm_notimmature_across_spermatogenesis.png", height=768)
h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(fused_m, row_title="Peaks from spermatozoa with GRE", raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = rocket(2000), mean_color = "#800080")
print(h)
dev.off()
```
# Fig S1D - Sperm GRE peaks across spermatogenesis hPTMs

Combined plot normalized
```{r activePTM-input, results='hide', fig.height=5, fig.width=4.5, fig.cap="Accessibility and ChIP signal of male germ cells at sperm peak regions"}
tracks <- c(
  H3K4me3="extern_data//SRR5049005.bw",#sperm4
  H3K27ac="extern_data/SRR3225845.bw",#sperm1
  H3K9ac="extern_data/SRR3225847.bw" #sperm1
)

peaks <- readRDS("objects/narrow_overlaps_spermGRE_not_immatureGermCellsGRE.rds")
m <- signal2Matrix(tracks, peaks, w=20, BPPARAM = 4)
m <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(m)


n <- renormalizeBorders(lapply(m,log1p))


```



Single panels of heatmaps
```{r}
# Create a list of heatmaps
for (i in 1:length(n)) {
  h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(n[i], raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = magma(2000), mean_color = "#800080",
                            heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL))
  
  # Save each heatmap to a PDF
    pdf(paste0("sup_plots/FigS1D_GREpeaks_from_sperm_notImmature_hPTMs_normalized_", i, ".pdf"), width=2.5, height=10)
  draw(h, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
# Create a list of heatmaps
for (i in 1:length(n)) {
  h <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(n[i], raster_resize_mat = TRUE, axis_name = c("-2kb","0","+2kb"), colors = magma(2000), mean_color = "#800080",
                            heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.4, "npc"), title=NULL))

  # Save each heatmap to a PNG

  dev.off()
}
```

# Fig S1F - Heatmap for ICR in mm10
```{r}
ICR <- read.csv("objects/ICR_Weber_mm10.csv",header = T)
ICR$seqnames <- ICR$X.chrom
ICR <- GRanges(ICR)

seqlevelsStyle(ICR) <- "Ensembl"

bw_mm10 <- list.files(path = "intern_data/Nanopore/",pattern = "_5mC_4reads|_5mC_(.*_noSex)",full.names = T)
names(bw_mm10) <- c("Ctrl1","Ctrl2","KO1","KO2")
```

```{r}
Met_bed <- sapply(names(bw_mm10),function(names){
  import.bw(bw_mm10[names])
  
  })
```




```{r}
sm <- signal2Matrix(filepaths = Met_bed,regions = ICR,w =10,type = "scaled",smooth = T,limit = c(0,100))
plotEnrichedHeatmaps(sm)
as.data.frame(ICR)
set.seed(123)
cl <- epiwraps::clusterSignalMatrices(sm,k = 2)
cl2 <- as.character(cl)

cl2[cl2 == 1] <- ("Maternal")

cl2[cl2 == 2] <- ("Paternal")


cl2 <- as.factor(cl2)

```

```{r}
sm_merge_Ctrl <- mergeSignalMatrices(sm[,1:2])


```

```{r}
mycolors2 <- c("Maternal" = "firebrick","Paternal"= "steelblue")
p <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(list("ICR" = sm_merge_Ctrl),row_split = cl2,scale_title = "5mC[%]",mean_color  = mycolors2, use_raster = T,heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28,"npc"), title = NULL))
```

```{r}
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")

  png(paste0("sup_plots/FigS1F.png"), width=250, height=500)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  pdf(paste0("sup_plots/FigS1F.pdf"), width=3.5, height=7.5)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  svg(paste0("sup_plots/FigS1F.svg"), width=3.5, height=7.5)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
```

# Fig S1G - Display of methlyation score distribution
```{r}
set.seed(1234)
Met_bed_Ctrl <- Met_bed[1:2]
df <- rbind(as.data.frame(sample(Met_bed_Ctrl$Ctrl1$score,size = 100000)),y = as.data.frame(sample(Met_bed_Ctrl$Ctrl1$score,size = 100000))) 
df$score <- df$`sample(Met_bed_Ctrl$Ctrl1$score, size = 1e+05)`
df$Sample <- rep("S1",nrow(df))
df$Sample[((nrow(df)/2)+1):nrow(df)] <- "S2" 
```
```{r}
ggplot(data = df,aes(x = score,group = Sample)) +

  geom_density(color = "orange2", size = 1,fill = "orange2",alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "5mC Score Distribution in mature sperm", x = "5mC score [%]", y = "Density") +
  theme_bw()+theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS1G_5mC_score_distribution.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS1G_5mC_score_distribution.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS1G_5mC_score_distribution.png")
```

```{r}
peaks2 <- peaks[overlapsAny(peaks,proms)]

peaks2 <- keepStandardChromosomes(peaks2,pruning.mode = "coarse")
```

# Fig S1M - GO:BP GR-ChIP

```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
```



```{r}
se <- readRDS("intern_data/ChIP/GR_counts_non_resized.SE.rds")
ah <- AnnotationHub()
genome <- ah[["AH89457"]]

annGR <- transcripts(genome,
 columns = c("tx_id", "tx_biotype", "gene_id", "gene_name")
)


anno_Stress <- ChIPpeakAnno::annoPeaks(peaks = granges(se),annoData = annGR,bindingType = "fullRange",select = "bestOne")

table(width(peaks)<=500)
```


```{r}
set.seed(123)
 

  gene_list <- unlist(anno_Stress$gene_name)
  gene_list <- gene_list[!duplicated(gene_list)]
  
kegg <- enrichGO(gene          = gene_list,
                OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
                keyType       = "SYMBOL",
                ont           = "BP",  # BP: Biological Process, MF: Molecular Function, CC: Cellular Component
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                pvalueCutoff  = 1,
                qvalueCutoff  = 1
                 
                    )


  
  

d <- dotplot(kegg, showCategory=10)
print(d)+ggtitle("GO:BP GR-Peaks Top10")
# kegg@result
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS1M_GOBP_GRChIP.png")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS1M_GOBP_GRChIP.pdf")
#kegg@result  
```

# Fig 2E - DEG heatmap PGC-GR-KO embryos

```{r}
# Load the data
se <- readRDS("objects/VF_2cell_embyro_early_paternal_GR_KO(Alpl).SE.rds")

# Extract assays and row data
assays(se)
rowData(se)
dea <- rowData(se)[[2]]
dea

# Subset differentially expressed genes with FDR < 0.05
deaFDR <- subset(dea, dea$FDR < 0.05)
deaFDR

# Define treatments and colors
treatments <- c("ctrl", "Early_GR_KO") # Specify the order explicitly
colors <- c("#DEDFE4", "darkgrey") # Adjust colors as needed

# Ensure the number of colors matches the number of treatments
if (length(colors) != length(treatments)) {
  stop("Number of colors must match number of treatments")
}

# Create a named vector for color mapping
color_mapping <- setNames(colors, treatments)

# Reorder columns in the se object
se <- se[, order(factor(colData(se)$condition, levels = treatments))]

# Add color_mapping to the heatmap annotation
ha = HeatmapAnnotation(df = data.frame(condition = factor(colData(se)$condition, levels = treatments)),
                       col = list(condition = color_mapping))

# Define color palette for the heatmap
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(100)

pdf("plots/Fig2E_DEGs_Alpl-KO_heatmap.pdf", height=4) #, width=14.5, height=10)
x <- sechm(se, rownames(deaFDR), assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, hmcols = color_palette, top_annotation = ha, row_title = "Differentially expressed genes", gaps_at="condition", use_raster = TRUE)
print(x)
dev.off()

png("plots/Fig2E_DEGs_Alpl-KO_PROTAC_heatmap.png", height=768)
x <- sechm(se, rownames(deaFDR), assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, hmcols = color_palette, top_annotation = ha, row_title = "Differentially expressed genes", gaps_at="condition", use_raster = TRUE)
print(x)
dev.off()

svg("plots/Fig2E_DEGs_Alpl-KO_heatmap.svg") #, width=14.5, height=10)
x <- sechm(se, rownames(deaFDR), assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, hmcols = color_palette, top_annotation = ha, row_title = "Differentially expressed genes", gaps_at="condition", use_raster = TRUE)
print(x)
dev.off()

sechm(se, rownames(deaFDR), assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, hmcols = color_palette, top_annotation = ha, row_title = "Differentially expressed genes", gaps_at="condition", use_raster = TRUE) 
```


#Fig 2F - volcano DEGs PGC-GR-KO


```{r}
library(scales)
se <- readRDS("objects/VF_2cell_embyro_early_paternal_GR_KO(Alpl).SE.rds")

# Extract assays and row data
assays(se)
rowData(se)
dea <- rowData(se)[[2]]
dea$Gene <- dea$ID

# Subset differentially expressed genes with FDR < 0.05
deaFDR <- subset(dea, dea$FDR < 0.005)
deaFDR

xlim <- c(-7, 7)
ylim <- c(0,6)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$FDR < 0.01
  df$extreme[df$logFC > xlim[2] | df$logFC < xlim[1] | -log10(df$FDR) > ylim[2] | -log10(df$FDR) < ylim[1]] <- "extreme"
  df$highlight[df$extreme == "extreme"] <- "extreme"
  top_genes <- df[order(df$FDR), ][1:25, ]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(FDR))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black", "extreme" = "firebrick3")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE | highlight == "extreme"), aes(label=Gene), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = xlim, oob = squish) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = ylim, oob = squish) +
    ggtitle(title)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
generate_volcano_plot(dea, "Differentially expressed genes in PGC-GR-KO 2-cell embryos")
ggsave("plots/Fig2F_DEGs_KO_volcano.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig2F_DEGs_KO_volcano.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig2F_DEGs_KO_volcano.png")
```

#Fig 2H 5mC at Promoter of embryo DEA

```{r}
dea <- readRDS("objects/DEA_e2c.rds")
annGR <- readRDS("objects/annGR.rds")
```



```{r}
set.seed(1234)
annGR <- readRDS("objects/annGR.rds")
annGR2 <-keepStandardChromosomes(annGR[annGR$gene_name %in% dea$ID,],pruning.mode = "coarse"); annGR <- dropSeqlevels(annGR,value = c("chrMT","X","Y"),pruning.mode = "coarse") 
DEA_up <- annGR[annGR$gene_name %in% dea$ID[(dea$FDR < 0.05) & (dea$logFC < 0)] ,]
DEA_up <- keepStandardChromosomes(DEA_up,pruning.mode = "coarse"); DEA_up <- dropSeqlevels(DEA_up,value = c("chrMT","X","Y"),pruning.mode = "coarse")
DEA_up <- GenomicRanges::reduce(DEA_up)



DEA_down <- annGR[annGR$gene_name %in% dea$ID[(dea$FDR < 0.05) & (dea$logFC > 0)] ,]
DEA_down <- keepStandardChromosomes(DEA_down,pruning.mode = "coarse"); DEA_down <- dropSeqlevels(DEA_down,value = c("chrMT","X","Y"),pruning.mode = "coarse")  
DEA_down <- GenomicRanges::reduce(DEA_down)
DEA_down <- sample(DEA_down,size = length(DEA_up))


DEA <- unlist(GRangesList(DEA_up,DEA_down))



# we remove random promoters which have now overlap with any methylData
annGR2 <- annGR2[overlapsAny(annGR2,unlist(GRangesList(methyl_bed)))]

randDEA <- sample(GenomicRanges::reduce(annGR2[!overlapsAny(annGR2,DEA),]),length(DEA_up))

DEA2 <- unlist(GRangesList(DEA_up,DEA_down,randDEA))

DEA <- resize(DEA,width = 2,fix = "start")
DEA2 <- resize(DEA2,width = 2,fix = "start")


# sanity check
#proms <- promoters(ensdb,upstream = 5,downstream = 5)

#overlapsAny(DEA2,proms)
```

```{r}
k <- integer(length(DEA2))
k[1:(length(DEA_up))] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP"
k[((length(DEA_up))+1):(length(DEA_up)+length(DEA_down))] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN"
k[(((length(DEA_up)+length(DEA_down)))+1):length(DEA2)] <- "randomProms"
```


```{r}
i <- integer(length(DEA))
i[1:(length(DEA_up))] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP"
i[((length(DEA_up))+1):length(DEA)] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN"

```

```{r}
sm1 <- signal2Matrix(filepaths = methyl_bed,w = 1,regions = DEA2,smooth = T,limit = c(0,100),extend = c(500,1500))

plotEnrichedHeatmaps(sm1)
```
```{r}
melt <- meltSignals(sm1,splitBy = k)
melt$Group <- melt$split
```
```{r}
theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(melt, aes(position, mean, colour=Group, group = Group, fill = Group)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed") +
  labs(x="TSS", y="mean 5mC [%]")+
  stat_summary(geom="ribbon", alpha=0.3, colour = NA ) + stat_summary(fun=median, geom="line", size = 0.6)+
  ggtitle("5mC levels of sperm at\npromoter regions of DEAs in the PGC-GR-KO embryo")+   
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#c0c0ffff","#ffa500ff","forestgreen")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#c0c0ffff","#ffa500ff","forestgreen")) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10), axis.title.x = element_text(hjust = 0.26))


ggsave("plots/Fig2H_Alpl_GR_KO_prompter.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig2H_Alpl_GR_KO_prompter.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig2H_Alpl_GR_KO_prompter.png")


```

```{r}
melt[melt$split == "randomProms",]
```

## AUC
here we use all genes e2c up and down


```{r}
set.seed(1234)
annGR <- readRDS("objects/annGR.rds")
annGR2 <-keepStandardChromosomes(annGR[annGR$gene_name %in% dea$ID,],pruning.mode = "coarse"); annGR <- dropSeqlevels(annGR,value = c("chrMT","X","Y"),pruning.mode = "coarse") 
DEA_up <- annGR[annGR$gene_name %in% dea$ID[(dea$FDR < 0.05) & (dea$logFC < 0)] ,]
DEA_up <- keepStandardChromosomes(DEA_up,pruning.mode = "coarse"); DEA_up <- dropSeqlevels(DEA_up,value = c("chrMT","X","Y"),pruning.mode = "coarse")
DEA_up <- reduce(DEA_up)



DEA_down <- annGR[annGR$gene_name %in% dea$ID[(dea$FDR < 0.05) & (dea$logFC > 0)] ,]
DEA_down <- keepStandardChromosomes(DEA_down,pruning.mode = "coarse"); DEA_down <- dropSeqlevels(DEA_down,value = c("chrMT","X","Y"),pruning.mode = "coarse")  
DEA_down <- reduce(DEA_down)
#DEA_down <- sample(DEA_down,size = length(DEA_up))


DEA <- unlist(GRangesList(DEA_up,DEA_down))



# we remove random promoters which have now overlap with any methylData
annGR2 <- annGR2[overlapsAny(annGR2,unlist(GRangesList(methyl_bed)))]

randDEA <- sample(reduce(annGR2[!overlapsAny(annGR2,DEA),]),length(DEA_up))

DEA2 <- unlist(GRangesList(DEA_up,DEA_down,randDEA))

DEA <- resize(DEA,width = 2,fix = "start")
DEA2 <- resize(DEA2,width = 2,fix = "start")


```

```{r}
k <- integer(length(DEA2))
k[1:(length(DEA_up))] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP"
k[((length(DEA_up))+1):(length(DEA_up)+length(DEA_down))] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN"
k[(((length(DEA_up)+length(DEA_down)))+1):length(DEA2)] <- "randomProms"
```


```{r}
i <- integer(length(DEA))
i[1:(length(DEA_up))] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP"
i[((length(DEA_up))+1):length(DEA)] <- "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN"

```

```{r}
sm1 <- signal2Matrix(filepaths = methyl_bed,w = 1,regions = DEA,smooth = T,limit = c(0,100),extend = c(500,1500))
# for proper calculations we ensure to remove regions where smoothing failed
sm1[is.na(as.data.frame(assay(sm1)))]
rows_with_na <- apply(as.data.frame(assay(sm1)), 1, function(row) any(is.na(row)))
sm1_clean <- sm1[!rows_with_na,]
i_clean <- i[!rows_with_na]
```


```{r}
plotEnrichedHeatmaps(sm1_clean)
assay(sm1_clean)
sm1_clean_merged <- mergeSignalMatrices(sm1_clean)  
df <- as.data.frame(sm1_clean_merged)
df <- df[,501:ncol(df)]
```
```{r}
AUC_per_region <- sapply(1:nrow(df),function(row){
  sm_auc(x =1:length(unlist(c(df[row,]))) , y =unlist(c(df[row,])))
})


mean(AUC_per_region[i_clean == "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN"])/mean(AUC_per_region[i_clean == "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP"])
median(AUC_per_region[i_clean == "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN"])/median(AUC_per_region[i_clean == "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP"])
```
```{r}
library(coin)
coin_wilcox <- coin::wilcox_test(AUC_per_region ~as.factor(i_clean),distribution=approximate(nresample = 10000))
  pvalue_wilcox <- pvalue(coin_wilcox)
  sigma_wilcox <- statistic(coin_wilcox)  
```


```{r}
melt <- meltSignals(sm1_clean,splitBy = i_clean)
melt$Group <- melt$split

melt_UP <- melt[melt$split == "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo UP",]
melt_DOWN <- melt[melt$split == "PGC-GR-KO\nearlyEmbryo DOWN",]
```

```{r}
mean_data_up <- melt_UP %>%
  group_by(position) %>%
  summarize(mean_y = mean(mean))


mean_data_down <- melt_DOWN %>%
  group_by(position) %>%
  summarize(mean_y = mean(mean))


x_min <- 0
x_max <- 1500



filtered_data_up <- mean_data_up %>%
  filter(position >= x_min & position <= x_max)
filtered_data_down <- mean_data_down %>%
  filter(position >= x_min & position <= x_max)

```

```{r}
library(smplot2)
up_auc <- sm_auc(filtered_data_up$position,filtered_data_up$mean_y)

down_auc <- sm_auc(filtered_data_down$position,filtered_data_down$mean_y)

down_auc/up_auc
```

# Fig S2F - GSEA PGC-GR-KO

```{r}
deaGO <- function(dea, threshold=0.05, direction=NULL, ontology="BP"){
  isDE <- dea$adj.P.Val<threshold
  if(!is.null(direction)) isDE <- isDE & sign(dea$logFC)==sign(direction)
  isDE <- setNames(factor(as.integer(isDE)),row.names(dea))
  print(table(isDE))
  god <- new("topGOdata", ontology=ontology, allGenes=isDE, 
             nodeSize=10, annot=annFUN.org, 
             ID="symbol", mapping="org.Mm.eg.db")
  ea <- runTest(god, algorithm="classic", statistic="fisher")
  res <- GenTable(god, classicFisher=ea, topNodes=length(god@graph@nodes))
  res$Term2 <- plgINS::breakStrings(res$Term)
  res$log2Enrichment <- log2(res$Significant/res$Expected)
  res$FDR <- p.adjust(res$classicFisher)
  res
}

deaGSEA <- function(dea, gsets = NULL){
  if(is.null(gsets))
    # gsets <- plgINS::getMsigSets(species = "Mus musculus", collections=c("H","C5"))
  
  db <- msigdbr::msigdbr(species = "mouse")
 db <- db[which(db$gs_collection %in% c("H", "C5")),]
gsets <- split(db$gene_symbol, db$gs_name)

    
    signature <- setNames(sign(dea$logFC)*-log10(dea$P.Value), row.names(dea))
  fg <- fgseaMultilevel(gsets, signature, minSize=10, nproc=3)
  fg$genes <- sapply(fg$leadingEdge, collapse=", ", FUN=paste)
  fg$leadingEdge <- NULL
  as.data.frame(fg[order(fg$pval),])
}
```

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/VF_2cell_embyro_early_paternal_GR_KO(Alpl).SE.rds")
deas <- getDEA(se)
dea <- deas$glmFit
dea$P.Value <- dea$PValue

dea2 <- dea %>% distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE)
rownames(dea2) <- dea2$ID

res2 <- deaGSEA(dea = dea2)

ggplot(head(res2,10), aes(x = reorder(pathway, NES), y = NES, fill = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey", high = "orange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Enriched gene sets in \n PGC-GR-KO derived embryos",
    x = "Gene set",
    y = "Enrichment Score",
    fill = "-log10(FDR)"
  )

ggsave("./sup_plots/FigS2F_GSEA_KO.svg")
ggsave("./sup_plots/FigS2F_GSEA_KO.pdf")
ggsave("./sup_plots/FigS2F_GSEA_KO.png")
```




# Fig S2G - Gene expression of Nr3c1 in early embryo og PGC-GR-KO sperm

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/VF_2cell_embyro_early_paternal_GR_KO(Alpl).SE.rds")
se$condition <- as.character(se$condition)
se$condition[se$condition == "Early_GR_KO"] <- "PGC-GR-KO"
se$condition[se$condition == "Ctrl"] <- "Control"
se$condition <- as.factor(se$condition)
```

```{r}
df <- as.data.frame(cbind(t(assays(se)$logcpm),colData(se))) # we extract data from the SE object and combine it with the colData as a dataframe, this makes it more easy to be accessed by ggplot

colnames(df) <- gsub(x = colnames(df),pattern = "^EN(.*)\\.",replacement = "")

df <- df[,!duplicated(colnames(df))]
```


```{r}

y <- 37.5
e <- ggplot(df, aes(x = condition, y = df$Nr3c1 , fill = df$condition))


 e2 <- e + geom_boxplot(width = 0.75,outlier.shape = NA ) + 
   geom_jitter(
   position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75),
  # aes(color = df$batch)
    )+
   ylab("logcpm")+
   xlab("Group")+
   ggtitle("Nr3c1 in 2-cell embryos")+

   scale_fill_manual(values=c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff"))+ #c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3")

   labs(fill= "")+
   scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Ctrl" = "Control", "Early_GR_KO" = "PGC-GR-KO"))+

 theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
  text = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.position = "none", # Change font size of all text

)
  print(e2)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS2G_Boxplot_Nr3c1.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS2G_Boxplot_Nr3c1.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS2G_Boxplot_Nr3c1.png")
 


```

```{r}
ame[1:10]
```

```{r}
ggplot(ame, aes(log2((1+tp)/(1+fp)), -log10(adj.pvalue))) + 
  geom_point(data=gr, aes(size=tp_percent), color="orange")+
  geom_text_repel(box.padding=0.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 10,  nudge_y = 0.3, direction = "y", hjust = "right", aes(label=motif_id ), data= gr)+
  geom_point(aes(size=tp_percent), alpha=0.3) + 
  geom_text_repel(box.padding=0.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = 10,  nudge_y = 0.3, direction = "y", hjust = "right", aes(label=motif_id ), data= head(ame,10))+
  labs(x="log2(fold-enrichment)", size="% of set")+
  ylab("-log10 (adjusted p-value)")+
  xlab("Enrichment")+
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("Top enriched motifs in the early embryo")+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = aes(color = NA)))

ggsave("./plots/Fig3A_motif_enrichment_embryo_highconfidencepeaks.svg")
ggsave("./plots/Fig3A_motif_enrichment_embryo_highconfidencepeaks.pdf")
ggsave("./plots/Fig3A_motif_enrichment_embryo_highconfidencepeaks.png")
```

```{r}
              "9"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[1], "10"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[2], "11"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[3], "12"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[4], "13"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[5], "14"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[6], "15"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[7], "16"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[8], "17"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[9], "18"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[10], "19"=brewer.pal(n=20,"Paired")[11])

set.seed(123)

peaks_emb <- readRDS("./objects/peaks_with_GRE_embryo_inAny.rds")

peaks_sperm <- reduce(peaks_sperm, with.revmap=TRUE)

fused_m <- c(list(sperm=fused_sperm_mat), m[5:9], m[-1:-9])

cl <- clusterSignalMatrices(fused_n, k=9) #% variance explained by clusters
ro <- order(rowMeans(fused_n$embryoearly2cell), decreasing = TRUE)
```

# Fig 3D - 2-cell SmartSeq

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/MK_EXP20.1_ProtacEmbryo_merged.SE.rds")

# Generate the dataframes
dex <- rowData(se)[[4]]
protac <- rowData(se)[[3]]
pd <- rowData(se)[[5]]

protac$Gene <- rownames(protac)
dex$Gene <- rownames(dex)
pd$Gene <- rownames(pd)

# List of dataframes
df_list <- list(Dex = dex, "KH-103" = protac, "KH-103+Dex" = pd)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$FDR < 0.1
  top_genes <- df[order(df$FDR), ][1:10, ]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(FDR))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE), aes(label=Gene), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
plots <- lapply(names(df_list), function(name) {
  generate_volcano_plot(df_list[[name]], paste("Differentially expressed genes in 2-cell embryos upon ", name, " treatment"))
})

print(plots)

# print(plots[1])
#   ggsave("plots//DEGs_EXP20-1_Dex_volcano.svg")
# ggsave("plots/DEGs_EXP20-1_Dex_volcano.pdf")
# ggsave("plots/DEGs_EXP20-1_Dex_volcano.png")

print(plots[2])
ggsave("plots/Fig3D_DEGs_EXP20-1_PROTAC_volcano.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig3D_DEGs_EXP20-1_PROTAC_volcano.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig3D_DEGs_EXP20-1_PROTAC_volcano.png")

# print(plots[3])
# ggsave("plots/DEGs_EXP20-1_PD_volcano.svg")
# ggsave("plots/DEGs_EXP20-1_PD_volcano.pdf")
# ggsave("plots/DEGs_EXP20-1_PD_volcano.png")
```

Correlation of EXP20.2 target DEGs in 20.1 and Fig S3D - bland-altmann-plot correlation

```{r,eval=FALSE}
se <- readRDS("objects/MK_EXP20.1_ProtacEmbryo_merged.SE.rds")

# Generate the dataframes
dex <- rowData(se)[[4]]
protac <- rowData(se)[[3]]
pd <- rowData(se)[[5]]
dex$Gene <- rownames(dex)
protac$Gene <- rownames(protac)
pd$Gene <- rownames(pd)

# Generate dataframes with FDR<0.05 used in this analysis
dexFDR <- subset(dex, dex$FDR <0.05)
protacFDR <- subset(protac, protac$FDR <0.05)
pdFDR <- subset(pd, pd$FDR <0.05)
dexFDR$Gene <- rownames(dexFDR)
protacFDR$Gene <- rownames(protacFDR)
pdFDR$Gene <- rownames(pdFDR)



# Create a list of dataframes and add column Gene to it
df_list <- list(dexFDR = dexFDR, protacFDR = protacFDR, pdFDR = pdFDR)

rEXP20_2 <- readRDS("objects/df_list_FDR01.rds")
rEXP20_2 <- lapply(rEXP20_2, function(df) {
  df$Gene <- rownames(df)
  return(df)
})

# Function to automate the process
process_dataframes <- function(df_name, df_list, rEXP20_2) {
  # Get the dataframe from the list
  df <- df_list[[df_name]]
  
  # Construct the variable names
  FDR_var <- paste0(df_name, "FDR")
  
  # Filter the df dataframe to include only the genes that are in rEXP20_2[[FDR_var]]
  df_filtered <- df[df$Gene %in% rEXP20_2[[FDR_var]]$Gene, ]
  
  # Filter rEXP20_2[[FDR_var]] to include only the genes that are in df_filtered
  rEXP20_2_FDR_filtered <- rEXP20_2[[FDR_var]][rEXP20_2[[FDR_var]]$Gene %in% df_filtered$Gene, ]
  
  # Merge the two dataframes on the 'Gene' column
  merged <- merge(df_filtered, rEXP20_2_FDR_filtered, by = "Gene")
  
  # Calculate the correlation of the logFC between the two dataframes
  correlation <- cor.test(merged$logFC.x, merged$logFC.y)
  
  # Print the correlation
  print(correlation)
  
  correlation <- cor(merged$logFC.x, merged$logFC.y)
  
  # Create a scatter plot
  plot <- ggplot(merged, aes(x=logFC.x, y=logFC.y)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label=Gene)) +  # Add the gene names to the plot
    geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, color="orange") +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = paste("Correlation:", round(correlation, 4)), vjust = -1.5, hjust = 1.2) +
    xlab(paste("logFC in 2-cell embryos")) +
    ylab(paste("logFC in 8-cell embryos")) +
    theme_classic() +
    ggtitle(paste("Correlation of gene expression changes between 2- and 8- cell embryos"))
  
  print(plot)
  ggsave("plots/correlation_EXP20-2_EXP20-1_PROTAC.svg")
  ggsave("plots/correlation_EXP20-2_EXP20-1_PROTAC.pdf")
  ggsave("plots/correlation_EXP20-2_EXP20-1_PROTAC.png")
  
  
  # Calculate means and differences
  merged$mean <- rowMeans(merged[,c("logFC.x", "logFC.y")])
  merged$difference <- merged$logFC.x - merged$logFC.y
  
  # Create a Bland-Altman plot
  bland_altman_plot <- ggplot(merged, aes(x=mean, y=difference)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label=Gene)) +
    geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, color="orange") +
    xlab(paste("Mean of logFC in 2-cell and 8-cell embryos")) +
    ylab(paste("Difference of logFC in 2-cell and 8-cell embryos")) +
    theme_classic() +
    ggtitle("Correlation of gene expression changes between 2- and 8-cell embryos")
  
  print(bland_altman_plot)
  ggsave("plots/correlationBAP_EXP20-2_EXP20-1_PROTAC.svg")
  ggsave("plots/correlationBAP_EXP20-2_EXP20-1_PROTAC.pdf")
  ggsave("plots/correlationBAP_EXP20-2_EXP20-1_PROTAC.png")
  
  return(merged)
}

# Can call this function with the dataframe names and the list of dataframes
df_names <- c("protac") #, "protac", "pd")
df_list <- list(protac = protac) #, protac = protac, pd = pd)

# Apply the function to each dataframe
lapply(df_names, process_dataframes, df_list = df_list, rEXP20_2 = rEXP20_2)
```

# Fig 3F - regionUpset DEGs in 2cell and 8cell


```{r}
library(UpSetR)

regionUpset2 <- function (x = NULL, genelist = NULL, returnList = FALSE, ...) 
{
    if (!is.null(genelist)) {
        x <- genelist
    }
    if (is.character(x)) 
        x <- as.list(x)
    stopifnot(length(x) > 1)
    if (is.list(x)) {
        if (is.null(names(x)) && all(unlist(lapply(x, is.character))) && 
            all(lengths(x) == 1)) 
            names(x) <- unlist(x)
        if (any(unlist(lapply(x, FUN = function(x) {
            if (is.character(x)) {
                if (length(x) != 0) return(TRUE)
                if (!file.exists(x)) return(TRUE)
            }
            FALSE
        })))) {
            stop("`x` should be a named list of character vectors.")
        }
    }
    x <- lapply(x, function(x) as.character(x))
    if (returnList) 
        return(x)
    UpSetR::upset(UpSetR::fromList(x), ...)
}
```

```{r}
embryo_hc_peaks_mm10 <- keepStandardChromosomes(embryo_hc_peaks_mm10, pruning.mode = "coarse")
```

# Fig S3C - GSEA of DEGs 

```{r}
deaGO <- function(dea, threshold=0.05, direction=NULL, ontology="BP"){
  isDE <- dea$adj.P.Val<threshold
  if(!is.null(direction)) isDE <- isDE & sign(dea$logFC)==sign(direction)
  isDE <- setNames(factor(as.integer(isDE)),row.names(dea))
  print(table(isDE))
  god <- new("topGOdata", ontology=ontology, allGenes=isDE, 
             nodeSize=10, annot=annFUN.org, 
             ID="symbol", mapping="org.Mm.eg.db")
  ea <- runTest(god, algorithm="classic", statistic="fisher")
  res <- GenTable(god, classicFisher=ea, topNodes=length(god@graph@nodes))
  res$Term2 <- plgINS::breakStrings(res$Term)
  res$log2Enrichment <- log2(res$Significant/res$Expected)
  res$FDR <- p.adjust(res$classicFisher)
  res
}

deaGSEA <- function(dea, gsets=NULL){
  if(is.null(gsets))
    gsets <- plgINS::getMsigSets("Mus musculus", collections=c("H","C5"))
  signature <- setNames(sign(dea$logFC)*-log10(dea$P.Value), row.names(dea))
  fg <- fgseaMultilevel(gsets, signature, minSize=10, nproc=3)
  fg$genes <- sapply(fg$leadingEdge, collapse=", ", FUN=paste)
  fg$leadingEdge <- NULL
  as.data.frame(fg[order(fg$pval),])
}
```

for 2-cell
```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/MK_EXP20.1_ProtacEmbryo_merged.SE.rds")

deas <- getDEA(se)
dea <- deas$PROTAC
```

```{r}
res2 <- readRDS("objects/GSEA_2cell.rds")

generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$padj < 0.05
  ggplot(df, aes(x=NES, y=-log10(padj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(df, highlight == TRUE), aes(label=pathway), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0) +
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}
generate_volcano_plot(res2, "Enriched gene sets in 2-cell embryos upon KH-103 treatment")
# ggsave("plots/GSEA_EXP20-1_PROTAC.svg")
# ggsave("plots/GSEA_EXP20-1_PROTAC.pdf")
# ggsave("plots/GSEA_EXP20-1_PROTAC.png")
```

alternative plot

```{r}
ggplot(head(res2,10), aes(x = reorder(pathway, NES), y = NES, fill = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey", high = "orange") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Gene Ontology Enrichment overall",
    x = "GO Term",
    y = "Enrichment Score",
    fill = "-log10(FDR)"
  )
```

# Fig 4E - 2cell Smartseq after Dex treatment in sperm and Fig S4F - 2cell Smartseq after KH-103 treatment in sperm

```{r}
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$adj.P.Val < 0.1
  top_genes <- df[order(df$adj.P.Val), ][1:10, ]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(adj.P.Val))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE), aes(label=Gene), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}

se <- readRDS("objects/MK_EXP16.4_embryoSeq_spermProtac_merged.SE.rds")

# Generate the dataframes 
dex <- rowData(se)[[4]]
protac <- rowData(se)[[3]]
pd <- rowData(se)[[5]]

protac$Gene <- rownames(protac)
dex$Gene <- rownames(dex)
pd$Gene <- rownames(pd)

# List of dataframes
df_list <- list(Dex = dex, "KH-103" = protac, "KH-103+Dex" = pd)

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
plots <- lapply(names(df_list), function(name) {
  generate_volcano_plot(df_list[[name]], paste("Differentially expressed genes in 2-cell embryos upon ", name, " treatment in sperm"))
})
print(plots[1])
ggsave("plots/Fig4E_DEGs_EXP16-4_Dex_volcano.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig4E_DEGs_EXP16-4_Dex_volcano.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig4E_DEGs_EXP16-4_Dex_volcano.png")
```

# Fig 4F - Reversal of Dex by KH-103

Can we see reversal for genes not passing significance?

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/MK_EXP16.4_embryoSeq_spermProtac_merged.SE.rds")
se <- se[, se$treatment != "MED"]
rescue <- rowData(se)[[6]]
rescue$Gene <- rownames(rescue)

rescue_sorted <- rescue[order(rescue$adj.P.Val), ]
rescue_sorted <- rescue_sorted[1:20, ]

treatments <- unique(se$treatment)

# Define your own colors
colors <- c(brewer.pal(9,"Set2")[3], "grey", "orange", brewer.pal(9,"Set2")[5] )#"#0000FF", "#800080", "grey", "black")  

# Make sure the number of colors matches the number of treatments
if (length(colors) != length(treatments)) {
  stop("Number of colors must match number of treatments")
}

colors <- c("#919297", "#DEDFE4", "darkgrey", "#393A3F")
# Create a named vector for color mapping
color_mapping <- setNames(colors, treatments)

# Add color_mapping to the heatmap annotation
ha = HeatmapAnnotation(df = data.frame(treatment = factor(colData(se)$treatment, levels = names(color_mapping))),
                       col = list(treatment = color_mapping))

#sechm(se, rescue_sorted, assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, top_annotation = ha, row_title="KH103-mediated\nrescue of DEX effect", gaps_at="treatment")
#needs title: Effects of KH-103 treatment in sperm on gene regulation in 2-cell embryos


color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(10000)

pdf("plots/Fig4F_DEGs_EXP16-4_rescue_heatmap.pdf", width=6, height=4) #, width=14.5, height=10)
x <- sechm(se, rescue_sorted, assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, top_annotation = ha, row_title="KH103-mediated\nrescue of DEX effect", gaps_at="treatment", hmcols = color_palette, use_raster = TRUE)
print(x)
dev.off()

png("plots/Fig4F_DEGs_EXP16-4_rescue_heatmap.png")#, height=768)
x <- sechm(se, rescue_sorted, assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, top_annotation = ha, row_title="KH103-mediated\nrescue of DEX effect", gaps_at="treatment", hmcols = color_palette, use_raster = TRUE)
print(x)
dev.off()

svg("plots/Fig4F_DEGs_EXP16-4_rescue_heatmap.svg")#, height=768)
x <- sechm(se, rescue_sorted, assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, top_annotation = ha, row_title="KH103-mediated\nrescue of DEX effect", gaps_at="treatment", hmcols = color_palette, use_raster = TRUE)
print(x)
dev.off()
rescue_sorted

sechm(se, rescue_sorted, assayName = "log2FC", do.scale = FALSE, top_annotation = ha, row_title="Differentially expressed genes", gaps_at="treatment", hmcols = color_palette, use_raster = TRUE)
```

# Fig S4K - 2cell volcano


```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/MK_EXP16.4_embryoSeq_spermProtac_merged.SE.rds")

# Generate the dataframes
dex <- rowData(se)[[4]]
protac <- rowData(se)[[3]]
pd <- rowData(se)[[5]]

protac$Gene <- rownames(protac)
dex$Gene <- rownames(dex)
pd$Gene <- rownames(pd)

# List of dataframes
df_list <- list(Dex = dex, "KH-103" = protac, "KH-103+Dex" = pd)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$adj.P.Val < 0.1
  top_genes <- df[order(df$adj.P.Val), ][1:10, ]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(adj.P.Val))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE), aes(label=Gene), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
plots <- lapply(names(df_list), function(name) {
  generate_volcano_plot(df_list[[name]], paste("Differentially expressed genes in 2-cell embryos upon ", name, " treatment"))
})

print(plots)

print(plots[2])
```

#Fig S4L - correlation with PGC-GR-KO

Calculate correaltion and visualize with scatterplot

```{r}
KO <- readRDS("objects/VF_2cell_embyro_early_paternal_GR_KO(Alpl).SE.rds")
KO <- rowData(KO)[[2]]
koFDR <- subset(KO, KO$FDR <0.05)
koFDR$Gene <- koFDR$ID


se <- readRDS("objects/SEs_for_SEV/MK_EXP16.4_embryoSeq_spermProtac_merged.SE.rds")
protac <- rowData(se)[[3]]
protac$Gene <- rownames(protac)


merged_data <- merge(koFDR, protac, by.x = "ID", by.y = "Gene")

correlation <- cor.test(merged_data$logFC.x, merged_data$logFC.y)
correlation

# Create a scatter plot to visualize the correlation
plot <- ggplot(merged_data, aes(x=logFC.x, y=logFC.y)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label=Gene)) +  # Add the gene names to the plot
    geom_smooth(method=lm, se=FALSE, color="orange") +
    #annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = paste("Correlation:", correlation)) +#, vjust = -1.5, hjust = 1.2) +
    xlab(paste("logFC in PGC-GR KO embryos")) +
    ylab(paste("logFC in embryos from KH-103 treated sperm")) +
    ggtitle(paste("Correlation of gene expression changes \n between PGC-GR KO embryos and embryos from KH-103 treated sperm"))+
    theme_classic()

print(plot)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS4L_correlation_VF-KO_EXP16-4_PROTAC.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS4L_correlation_VF-KO_EXP16-4_PROTAC.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS4L_correlation_VF-KO_EXP16-4_PROTAC.png")
```

# Fig 5B F0 Transition through center

```{r}
# load data
report_tracking <- read.csv("objects/OFT_Report.csv",sep = ";")
report_tracking <- data.frame(report_tracking)

meta <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("objects/stressed_males_OFT_metadata.xlsx") # check if everything is right

# check if order is right
report_tracking$file == meta$OFTfile

# if not change order of meta file
report_tracking$file == meta[order(meta$OFTfile),]$OFTfile

report_tracking$condition <- meta[order(meta$OFTfile),]$condition

#Relabel "IFS" as "Stress"

report_tracking$condition <- factor(report_tracking$condition,
                                    levels = c("Control", "IFS"),
                                    labels = c("Control", "Stress"))


```

```{r}
theme_set(theme_classic())
```

```{r,fig.width=4,fig.height=5}
e <- ggplot(report_tracking, aes(x = condition, y = bodycentre.center.transitions, fill=condition))
cols <- c("seashell2", "#ffa500ff")

e2 <- e +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.75, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1), dodge.width = 0.75) +
  #stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 4, size = 3, color = "red", fill = "red") +
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("Control", "Stress")), map_signif_level = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(title = "Center Transitions") +
  ylab("Counts") +
  xlab("Condition") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20),
    text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(e2)

ggsave("plots/Fig5B.Transitions.png")
ggsave("plots/Fig5B.Transitions.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig5B.Transitions.svg")
```

# Fig 5D GR-ChiP DEA
```{r}
df <- readRDS("objects/GR_ChIP_DEA.DF.rds")
GR_ChIP.df <- df


```
```{r}
library(scales)


xlim <- c(-7, 7)
ylim <- c(0,6)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$FDR < 0.05
  # df$extreme[df$logFC > xlim[2] | df$logFC < xlim[1] | -log10(df$FDR) > ylim[2] | -log10(df$FDR) < ylim[1]] <- "extreme"
  df$highlight[df$extreme == "extreme"] <- "extreme"
  top_genes <- df[df$FDR < 0.05,]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(FDR))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE ), aes(label=GeneAnno), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
generate_volcano_plot(df, "DEA of GR-ChIP in Stress vs Ctrl")
ggsave("plots/Fig5D_DEAs_GRChIP_volcano.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig5D_DEAs_GRChIP_volcano.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig5D_DEAs_GRChIP_volcano.png")
```

# Fig 5F Motif Acitivy with Arche
```{r}
df <- readRDS("objects/GRChIPArche_Results.DF.rds")
```
```{r}
library(scales)


xlim <- c(-7, 7)
ylim <- c(0,6)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$adj.P.Val < 0.05
  # df$extreme[df$logFC > xlim[2] | df$logFC < xlim[1] | -log10(df$FDR) > ylim[2] | -log10(df$FDR) < ylim[1]] <- "extreme"
  # df$highlight[df$extreme == "extreme"] <- "extreme"
  top_genes <- df[1:2,]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(adj.P.Val))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label=archetype), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
generate_volcano_plot(df, "MotifActivity (Archetypes) of GR-ChIP in Stress vs Ctrl")
ggsave("plots/Fig5F_MotifAct_GRChIP_volcano.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig5F_MotifAct_GRChIP_volcano.pdf")
ggsave("plots/Fig5F_MotifAct_GRChIP_volcano.png")
```

```{r}

tracks_lit <- c(

  MII_oocyte="/mnt/gapp/work/vincent/paper/Kretschmer2025/GitHub_submission2/extern_data/ATAC_PRJNA480448_MIIOocyte_GSM3262863.bw"
)
length(tracks_lit)





bw <- list.files(path = "intern_data/ChIP/",pattern = "*.bw$",full.names = T)
names(bw) <- basename(bw)

bw_groups <- list(Stress = bw[c(7:10)], Ctrl = bw[c(1:4)], Input = bw[c(5:6)])



GR_bed <- sapply(names(bw),function(names){
  import.bw(bw[names])
})
GR_bed <- GR_bed[c(-5,-6)] # we remove input


bw_embryoH3K4me3 <- list.files("intern_data/CUTNTag/",pattern = ".bw$",full.names = T)
names(bw_embryoH3K4me3) <- basename(bw_embryoH3K4me3)



proms <- granges(readRDS("objects/GRChIP_all_H3k4me3e2c.GR.rds"))

proms <- GenomeInfoDb::keepStandardChromosomes((proms),pruning.mode = "coarse")
ah <- AnnotationHub()
ensdb <- ah[["AH89457"]]
ensdb <- GenomeInfoDb::keepStandardChromosomes(transcripts(ensdb),pruning.mode = "coarse")

seqlevels(proms) <- seqlevels(ensdb)
seqinfo(proms) <- seqinfo(ensdb)


  sm_GR <-  signal2Matrix(filepaths = GR_bed,regions = proms,w = 20L,smooth = T, background= 0) 
  sm_merge_GR_IFS <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_GR)[c(5:8)])
 # make sure to only take rows were we have the necessary information in 5mC
  
  sm_merge_GR_Ctrl <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_GR)[c(1:4)])
 # make sure to only take rows were we have the necessary information in 5mC
  
  # make sure to only take rows were we have the necessary information in 5mC
  
  sm <- signal2Matrix(w = 20L, filepaths = tracks_lit,regions = proms)


  sm_Oocyte <- epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm)
  
  sm_embryo <- signal2Matrix(w = 20L, filepaths = bw_embryoH3K4me3,regions = proms)
  sm_merge_embryoCtrl <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_embryo)[1:2])
  sm_merge_embryoIFS <- mergeSignalMatrices(epiwraps:::.ese2ml(sm_embryo)[3:4])
  

  
  # order overall
  pOverall <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(list(GR_Ctrl = sm_merge_GR_Ctrl,GR_IFS = sm_merge_GR_IFS,H3K4me3EmbryoCtrl = sm_merge_embryoCtrl,H3K4me3EmbryoIFS = sm_merge_embryoIFS),multiScale = T)
  ro_Overall <- pOverall@ht_list[[1]]@row_order
  
  
  # plot with order of Overall
  p <- plotEnrichedHeatmaps(list(GR_Ctrl = sm_merge_GR_Ctrl,GR_IFS = sm_merge_GR_IFS),use_raster = T,row_title = paste0("Overlap GR-ChIP and H3K4me3 early embryo") ,scale_title = "GR\ndesnity",colors = mako(2000),mean_scale_side = "none", trim = c(0.02,0.98),axis_name = c("-2kb","Center","+2kb"),row_order = ro_Overall,heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL)) +
    plotEnrichedHeatmaps(ml = list(H3K4me3EmbryoCtrl = sm_merge_embryoCtrl,H3K4me3EmbryoIFS = sm_merge_embryoIFS),use_raster = T,row_title = paste0("Overlap GR-ChIP and H3K4me3 early embryo") ,scale_title = "Embryo\ndensity",colors = colorRampPalette(c("#000000","#00A97A","#00FF7F"))(2000),mean_scale_side = "none",axis_name = c("-2kb","Center","+2kb"),row_order = ro_Overall, heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL),scale_rows = FALSE)+
    plotEnrichedHeatmaps(ml = sm_Oocyte,use_raster = T,row_title = paste0("Overlap GR-ChIP and H3K4me3 early embryo") ,scale_title = "Oocyte\ndensity",colors = colorRampPalette(c("#000000","firebrick1"))(2000),mean_scale_side = "none",axis_name = c("-2kb","Center","+2kb"),row_order = ro_Overall, heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_direction = "horizontal", legend_width = unit(0.28, "npc"), title=NULL),scale_rows = FALSE)
  
    
  
  print(p)
  
  
  png(paste0("plots/","Fig5G_Heatmap_GRChIP_H3k4me3",".png"), width=1250, height=768)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  pdf(paste0("plots/","Fig5G_Heatmap_GRChIP_H3k4me3",".pdf"), width=10, height=10)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()
  
  svg(paste0("plots/","Fig5G_Heatmap_GRChIP_H3k4me3",".svg"), width=10, height=10)
  draw(p, heatmap_legend_side="bottom", annotation_legend_side="right",  legend_grouping = "original")
  dev.off()


```


# Fig 5H Protac effect on long RNA

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/countMatrix_longRNA_sperm.SE.rds")

se$group <- factor(paste0(se$stress, "_", se$protac))

dge_for_filter <- DGEList(assay(se, "counts"))
dge_for_filter <- calcNormFactors(dge_for_filter)
design_for_filter <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se)))
# Filter using the temporary design matrix
keep <- filterByExpr(dge_for_filter, min.count = 20, design = design_for_filter)
se  <- se[keep, ]
# add donor info
colData(se)$donor <- sub("^(C[0-9]+|I[0-9]+)[DK]$", "\\1", colData(se)$sampleid)
colData(se)$donor <- factor(colData(se)$donor)

# voom
dge <- DGEList(assay(se, "counts"))
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)


assays(se)$logcpm <- log1p(edgeR::cpm(dge))
```


```{r}

mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("objects/mmu_rip_gene_name.xlsx", colNames = FALSE)

allGR_se <- se[rownames(se)%in% mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge$X1, ]

# calculate the logFC manually to avoid anything to do with SVA
allGR_se <- log2FC(allGR_se, fromAssay = "logcpm", controls = allGR_se$protac == "DMSO", by = allGR_se$stress, isLog = TRUE)

# because here we calculate logFC(protac/dmso), and within the stress group. So here we can just use the avg logFC of all the protac samples as the final logFC for this gene
df_allGR_logFC <- rowMeans(assay(allGR_se, "log2FC")[,allGR_se$protac=="PROTAC"])

n_down <- sum(df_allGR_logFC<0)
N <- length(df_allGR_logFC)

binom.test(n_down, N, p = 0.5, alternative = "two.sided")


# to plot the heatmap, use the normalization to donor
allGR_se_for_heatmap <- allGR_se
allGR_se_for_heatmap <- log2FC(allGR_se_for_heatmap, fromAssay = "logcpm", controls = allGR_se_for_heatmap$protac == "DMSO", by = allGR_se_for_heatmap$donor, isLog = TRUE)


```
```{r}
rowData(allGR_se_for_heatmap)$direction <- ifelse(df_allGR_logFC>0,yes = "up",no = "down")
```
```{r}
sechm(
  allGR_se_for_heatmap,
  names(df_allGR_logFC),
  assayName = "scaledLFC",
  cluster_rows = F,
  top_annotation = c( "protac"),
  hmcols =colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(101),
  gaps_at = c("protac"),gaps_row = "direction"
  )
```


```{r}
sh <-  sechm(
  allGR_se_for_heatmap[,allGR_se_for_heatmap$protac == "PROTAC"],
  names(df_allGR_logFC),
  assayName = "scaledLFC",
  cluster_rows = F,
  top_annotation = c("stress", "protac"),
  hmcols =colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(101),
  gaps_at = c("protac"),
 gaps_row = "direction",
  column_title = "KH-103 effect on GR binding long RNA", use_raster = TRUE
  ) 

pdf("plots/Fig5H_longRNA_Heatmap_slim.pdf", width=6, height=8) #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()

png("plots/Fig5H_longRNA_Heatmap_slim.png", height=500,width = 300,)

print(sh)
dev.off()

svg("plots/Fig5H_longRNA_Heatmap_slim.svg", width=6, height=8) #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()


sh <- sechm(
```

# Fig 5I Heatmap of differential expressed genes with a counteraction of KH-103 and Stress


```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/IFS_smartSeq_embryo_salmon.SE.rds")
meta <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("objects/IFS_smartSeq_embryo_meta.xlsx",colNames = T) 
meta <- meta[order(meta$Sample),]
meta <- meta[meta$Sample %in% colnames(se),]
table(meta$Sample == colnames(se))
se$embryos <- as.factor(meta$embryos)

Group <- factor(paste(se$treatment,se$condition,sep="."))


se$Group <- Group



```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
se <- SEtools::svacor(se, ~Group+embryos,form0 = ~embryos, n.sv = 3)

```

```{r}
dds <- calcNormFactors(DGEList(assay(se))) # this calculates Normalization factors according to library sequencing depth, this is important since depth can vary greatly between samples

### lets look at the library size
dds$samples



assays(se)$logcpm <- log1p(edgeR::cpm(dds)) # generates the log of Counts-per-million (CPM), this is a very standardized way to normalize data used then for analysis or visualisation




mm <- model.matrix(~0+Group+SV1+SV2+embryos, data=as.data.frame(colData(se))); mm


dds <- dds[filterByExpr(dds, group = Group, min.count=20),] # 20 maybe to stringent for embryo data
dds <- estimateDisp(dds,design = mm)
se <- se[row.names(dds),]

fit <- glmFit(dds, mm, prior.count = 5) # we us prior.count 5 since we are working with low count data
```
Creating contrasts
```{r}
fit$design

my.contrast <- makeContrasts(
  DMSO_IFSvsCTRL = GroupDMSO.IFS - GroupDMSO.CTRL ,
  PROTAC_IFSvsCTRL = GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupPROTAC.CTRL,
  IFS_PROTACvsDMSO = GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupDMSO.IFS,
  CTRL_PROTACvsDMSO = GroupPROTAC.CTRL - GroupDMSO.CTRL,
  IFS_PROTAC_int = ((GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupPROTAC.CTRL) - (GroupDMSO.IFS - GroupDMSO.CTRL)), # interaction term

  Total_IFSvsCTRL = (GroupDMSO.IFS - GroupDMSO.CTRL + GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupPROTAC.CTRL)/2,
  Total_PROTACvsDMSO =  (GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupDMSO.IFS + GroupPROTAC.CTRL - GroupDMSO.CTRL)/2,
  levels = mm
)
my.contrast  

```


```{r}
Results <- list()
 
for (con in colnames(my.contrast)){
  Results[[con]] <- as.data.frame(topTags(glmLRT(fit,contrast = my.contrast[,con]),Inf))
  Results[[con]]$ID <- gsub(x = rownames(Results[[con]]),pattern = "ENS(.*)\\.",replacement = "")
  Results[[con]]$DEA <- con
}
Results

```

```{r}
RNA_df_Stress_total <- Results$Total_IFSvsCTRL


RNA_df_Stress_Protac <- Results$IFS_PROTAC_int
RNA_df_Stress_Protac <- RNA_df_Stress_Protac[which(RNA_df_Stress_Protac$FDR < 0.05),]

habituation_list <- RNA_df_Stress_total[, c(1, 6)] #get the logFC and ID
colnames(habituation_list)[1] <- "Stress_coef"

habituation_list$StressProtac_coef <- RNA_df_Stress_Protac[rownames(RNA_df_Stress_total[rownames(RNA_df_Stress_total),]),]$logFC
habituation_list1 <- habituation_list[which(habituation_list$StressProtac_coef * habituation_list$Stress_coef < 0),]
```

```{r}
metadata(se)$anno_colors <- list(condition=c(CTRL="steelblue", IFS ="firebrick3"), treatment =c(PROTAC = "orange", DMSO = "purple4"), Group = c("DMSO.CTRL" = "seashell2","DMSO.IFS" =  "#ffa500ff" , "PROTAC.CTRL" = "seashell4" , "PROTAC.IFS" = "tomato3"))

```
```{r}
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(101)
rownames(se) <- gsub(x = rownames(se),pattern = "^ENS(.*)\\.",replacement = "")



sh <- sechm(se,features = habituation_list1$ID,assayName = "corrected",hmcols = color_palette,do.scale =T,gaps_at = c("treatment"),column_order = colnames(se)[order(colData(se)$condition)],show_rownames = T,name = paste0("Counter.Genes","\nz-score"),top_annotation = c("Group"),use_raster = T,column_title = "Differential gene expression in 2-cell embryos\nupon parternal stress and PROTAC counteraction",column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)) 
print(sh)



pdf("plots/Fig5I.counteractingProtacGenes.heatmap.pdf", width=14.5, height=10) #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()

png("plots/Fig5I.counteractingProtacGenes.heatmap.png", height=638,width = 872,)

print(sh)
dev.off()

svg("plots/Fig5I.counteractingProtacGenes.heatmap.svg") #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()

```

## Fig S5D Archetype in H3K4me3

```{r}
df <- readRDS("objects/H3K4me3CTArche_Results.DF.rds")
```
```{r}
library(scales)


xlim <- c(-7, 7)
ylim <- c(0,6)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$adj.P.Val < 0.05
  # df$extreme[df$logFC > xlim[2] | df$logFC < xlim[1] | -log10(df$FDR) > ylim[2] | -log10(df$FDR) < ylim[1]] <- "extreme"
  df$highlight[df$extreme == "extreme"] <- "extreme"
  top_genes <- df[df$adj.P.Val < 0.05,]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(adj.P.Val))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE ), aes(label=archetype), size=3.5, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position="none") +
    ggtitle(title)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
generate_volcano_plot(df, "MotifActivity (Archetype) of H3K4me3 embryonal signal in Stress vs Ctrl")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5D_Arche_H3K4me3_e2c.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5D_Arche_H3K4me3_e2c.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5D_Arche_H3K4me3_e2c.png")
```


## Fig S5E Mepe tracks 

load necessary data

```{r}

```

```{r}
bw <- list.files("intern_data/ChIP/",pattern = "*.bw$",full.names = T)
names(bw) <- basename(bw)
```
