## Fig S5F Circ and small RNA
### Fig S5F circRNA volcanoPlot

```{r}

circRNA_bsj <- read.csv("objects/circRNA_bsj.csv")
circRNA_info <- read.csv("objects/circRNA_info.csv")
rownames(circRNA_bsj) <- circRNA_bsj$circ_id
rownames(circRNA_info) <- circRNA_info$circ_id
# circRNA_bsj$gene_name <- circRNA_info[rownames(circRNA_bsj),]$gene_name

circ_counts <- circRNA_bsj[, -1]
se <- SummarizedExperiment(
  assays = list(counts = circ_counts),
  colData = data.frame(sampleid = colnames(circ_counts), 
                 stress = ifelse(substr(colnames(circ_counts), 1, 1)=="C", "ctrl", "ifs"),
                 protac = ifelse(substr(colnames(circ_counts), nchar(colnames(circ_counts)), nchar(colnames(circ_counts)))=="D", "DMSO", "PROTAC"))
)
se$group <- factor(paste0(se$stress, "_", se$protac))
# we dont do the sva
```



```{r}
# add the host gene info to se
rowData(se)$host_gene <- circRNA_info[rownames(se),]$gene_name
rowData(se)$circ_type <- circRNA_info[rownames(se),]$circ_type
rowData(se)$gene_type <- circRNA_info[rownames(se),]$gene_type
rowData(se)$strand <- circRNA_info[rownames(se),]$strand


dge_for_filter <- DGEList(assay(se, "counts"))
dge_for_filter <- calcNormFactors(dge_for_filter)
design_for_filter <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se)))
keep <- filterByExpr(dge_for_filter, min.count = 5, design = design_for_filter)  # only use min.count=5 because circRNA has low reads.

se <- se[keep, ] # 4858 circRNAs kept

# voom
dge <- DGEList(assay(se, "counts"))
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)
design<- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se)))
assay(se, "logcpm") <- log1p(edgeR::cpm(dge)[rownames(se),])

# add donor info
colData(se)$donor <- sub("^(C[0-9]+|I[0-9]+)[DK]$", "\\1", colData(se)$sampleid)
colData(se)$donor <- factor(colData(se)$donor)

# ── 2. First voom + first duplicateCorrelation pass ───────────────────────────
vobj_for_dupcor <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
dupcor <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_for_dupcor, design, block = colData(se)$donor)

# ── 3. Second voom pass, now informed by the donor correlation ─────────────────
vobj <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE,
             block       = colData(se)$donor,
             correlation = dupcor$consensus)

# ── 4. Second duplicateCorrelation pass on the better voom weights ─────────────
dupcor <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj, design, block = colData(se)$donor)

# ── 5. Fit the linear model ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fit <- lmFit(vobj, design, block=colData(se)$donor, correlation = dupcor$consensus)

contrast <- makeContrasts(
  total_stress_vs_ctrl  = (groupifs_DMSO + groupifs_PROTAC)/2 - (groupctrl_DMSO + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2,
  DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl   = groupifs_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO,
  PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl = groupifs_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC,
  total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO  = (groupifs_PROTAC + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2 - (groupifs_DMSO + groupctrl_DMSO)/2,
  ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO   = groupctrl_PROTAC - groupctrl_DMSO,
  stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO = groupifs_PROTAC - groupifs_DMSO,
  interaction           = (groupifs_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC) - (groupifs_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO),
  levels = design
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)  # Empirical Bayes smoothing of standard errors


# extract each contrast table 
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2, coef = "total_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2, coef = "DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2, coef = "PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2, coef = "total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2, coef = "ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2, coef = "stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.interaction <- topTable(fit2, coef = "interaction", n = Inf)


table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no 
table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no 
table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no 
table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no 
table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no 
table(rowData(se)$DEA.voom.interaction$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no

```



```{r}
res <- rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl
```
```{r}
res$circ_id <- rownames(res) 
circRNA_info




library(dplyr)

result <- res %>%
  left_join(circRNA_info, by = "circ_id")

rownames(result) <- result$circ_id
result <- result[order(result$P.Value),]

result[grep("Tasp1",result$gene_name),]
```


```{r}
sig_anno <- rep("non", times = nrow(res))
sig_anno[which(res$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & res$logFC > 0)] <- "up" # no ups
sig_anno[which(res$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & res$logFC< 0)] <- "down"  # no downs
result$sig_anno <- sig_anno
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

p <- ggplot(
  result,
  aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value), color = sig_anno)
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("up" = "red", "non" = "gray", "down" = "blue")
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = head(result),
    aes(label = gene_name),
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "logFC",
    y = "-log10(P.value)",
    title = "Sperm circRNA (Stress vs. Ctrl)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",axis.text.x = element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=12),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14) 
    )

p

# 
# 
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_CircRNA_totalStress.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_CircRNA_totalStress.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_CircRNA_totalStress.png")
```
### Fig S5F smallRNA

```{r}
library(stringr)

se <- readRDS("objects/countMatrix_smallRNA_sperm.SE.rds")


# Now in our data, for tRNA: we have Match_genome and Unmatch_genome for the same tRNA annotation. We collapse them:
counts_df <- as.data.frame(assay(se, "counts"))
counts_df$feature <- rownames(counts_df)
# for nucleus tRNA:
counts_df$merge_key <- ifelse(
  str_detect(counts_df$feature, "GtRNAdb-mature-tRNA") &
    str_detect(counts_df$feature, "(Match|Unmatch)_Genome") &
    !str_detect(counts_df$feature, "(_3_end|_5_end)"),
  str_replace(counts_df$feature, "(Match|Unmatch)_Genome/(.+)", "Combined_Genome/\\2"),
  counts_df$feature
)
# for mitochondrial tRNA: (similar)
counts_df$merge_key <- ifelse(
  str_detect(counts_df$feature, "mitotRNAdb-mature-mt_tRNA") &
    str_detect(counts_df$feature, "(Match|Unmatch)_Genome") &
    !str_detect(counts_df$feature, "(_3_end|_5_end)"),
  str_replace(counts_df$feature, "(Match|Unmatch)_Genome/(.+)", "Combined_Genome/\\2"),
  counts_df$merge_key
)

counts_df$feature <- NULL  # drop before aggregation
counts_merged <- aggregate(. ~ merge_key, data = counts_df, FUN = sum)
rownames(counts_merged) <- counts_merged$merge_key
counts_merged$merge_key <- NULL

se_collapse <- SummarizedExperiment(
  assays = list(counts = as.matrix(counts_merged)),
  colData = colData(se)
)
se_collapse # 2238 smallRNAs
se_collapse <- se_collapse[,order(se_collapse$stress, se_collapse$protac)]
rm(se)

# add donor info
colData(se_collapse)$donor <- sub("^(C[0-9]+|I[0-9]+)[DK]$", "\\1", colData(se_collapse)$sampleid)
colData(se_collapse)$donor <- factor(colData(se_collapse)$donor)
metadata(se_collapse)$anno_colors <- list(stress = c(stress = "red3", ctrl ="#56B4E9"),
                                          protac = c(PROTAC = "orange2", DMSO = "navy"))
colnames(se_collapse) <- se_collapse$sampleid

dge_tmp <- DGEList(assay(se_collapse, "counts"))
dge_tmp <- calcNormFactors(dge_tmp)
assay(se_collapse, "logcpm") <- log1p(edgeR::cpm(dge_tmp)[rownames(se_collapse),])
```



For now only look at the tRNA and miRNA

```{r}
se_mirna <- se_collapse[grep("miRNA", rownames(se_collapse)),]  # 970
se_trna <- se_collapse[grep("GtRNAdb", rownames(se_collapse)), ]  # 181 (no mito-tRNA)
se_mito_trna <- se_collapse[grep("mitotRNAdb", rownames(se_collapse)), ]  # 75

```

miRNA:

```{r}
group <- factor(se_mirna$group)
set.seed(8)
se_mirna <- SEtools::svacor(se_mirna, ~group, n.sv = 1)  # the suggested sv number is 2

# counts filter
dge_for_filter <- DGEList(assay(se_mirna, "counts"))
dge_for_filter <- calcNormFactors(dge_for_filter)
design_for_filter <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se_mirna)))
keep <- filterByExpr(dge_for_filter, min.count = 5, design = design_for_filter)
se_mirna  <- se_mirna[keep, ]  # 942 kept

# voom
dge_mirna <- DGEList(assay(se_mirna, "counts"))
dge_mirna <- calcNormFactors(dge_mirna)
design_mirna <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + SV1, data = as.data.frame(colData(se_mirna)))
# ── 2. First voom + first duplicateCorrelation pass ───────────────────────────
vobj_for_dupcor_mirna <- voom(dge_mirna, design_mirna, plot = FALSE)
dupcor_mirna <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_for_dupcor_mirna, design_mirna, block = colData(se_mirna)$donor)

# ── 3. Second voom pass, now informed by the donor correlation ─────────────────
vobj_mirna <- voom(dge_mirna, design_mirna, plot = FALSE, block = colData(se_mirna)$donor,
             correlation = dupcor_mirna$consensus)

# ── 4. Second duplicateCorrelation pass on the better voom weights ─────────────
dupcor_mirna <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_mirna, design_mirna, block = colData(se_mirna)$donor)

# ── 5. Fit the linear model ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fit_mirna <- lmFit(vobj_mirna, design_mirna, block=colData(se_mirna)$donor, correlation = dupcor_mirna$consensus)

contrast_mirna <- makeContrasts(
  total_stress_vs_ctrl  = (groupstress_DMSO + groupstress_PROTAC)/2 - (groupctrl_DMSO + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2,
  DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl   = groupstress_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO,
  PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl = groupstress_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC,
  total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO  = (groupstress_PROTAC + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2 - (groupstress_DMSO + groupctrl_DMSO)/2,
  ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO   = groupctrl_PROTAC - groupctrl_DMSO,
  stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO = groupstress_PROTAC - groupstress_DMSO,
  interaction           = (groupstress_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC) - (groupstress_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO),
  levels = design_mirna
)

fit2_mirna <- contrasts.fit(fit_mirna, contrast_mirna)
fit2_mirna <- eBayes(fit2_mirna)  # Empirical Bayes smoothing of standard errors

# extract each contrast table 
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "total_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se_mirna),]
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se_mirna),]
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se_mirna),]
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se_mirna),]
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se_mirna),]
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se_mirna),]
rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.interaction <- topTable(fit2_mirna, coef = "interaction", n = Inf)

table(rownames(se_mirna)== rownames(vobj_mirna$E))
assay(se_mirna, "voom.val") <- vobj_mirna$E

table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)   # no
table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05) # no
table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05) # no
table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.interaction$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no

```


```{r}
# protac effect
res_mirna <- rowData(se_mirna)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO
sig_anno_mirna <- rep("non", times = nrow(res_mirna))
sig_anno_mirna[which(res_mirna$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & res_mirna$logFC > 0)] <- "up"  # no ups
sig_anno_mirna[which(res_mirna$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & res_mirna$logFC< 0)] <- "down"  # no downs

res_mirna <- res_mirna[order(res_mirna$P.Value),]
res_mirna$miRNA <- basename(rownames(res_mirna))
res_mirna$sig_anno_mirna <- sig_anno_mirna


p_mirna <- ggplot(
  res_mirna,
  aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value), color = sig_anno_mirna)
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("up" = "red", "non" = "gray", "down" = "blue")
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = head(res_mirna),
    aes(label = miRNA),
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "logFC",
    y = "-log10(P.value)",
    title = "Sperm miRNA (KH-103 vs. DMSO)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",axis.text.x = element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=12),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14) 
    )

p_mirna
# 
# 
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_miRNA_totalPROTAC.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_miRNA_totalPROTAC.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_miRNA_totalPROTAC.png")
```

tRNA:

```{r}
group <- factor(se_trna$group)
set.seed(8)
se_trna <- SEtools::svacor(se_trna, ~group, n.sv = 1)  # the suggested sv number is 2

# counts filter
dge_for_filter <- DGEList(assay(se_trna, "counts"))
dge_for_filter <- calcNormFactors(dge_for_filter)
design_for_filter <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se_trna)))
keep <- filterByExpr(dge_for_filter, min.count = 5, design = design_for_filter)
se_trna  <- se_trna[keep, ]  # 145 kept

# voom
dge_trna <- DGEList(assay(se_trna, "counts"))
dge_trna <- calcNormFactors(dge_trna)
design_trna <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + SV1, data = as.data.frame(colData(se_trna)))
# ── 2. First voom + first duplicateCorrelation pass ───────────────────────────
vobj_for_dupcor_trna <- voom(dge_trna, design_trna, plot = FALSE)
dupcor_trna <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_for_dupcor_trna, design_trna, block = colData(se_trna)$donor)

# ── 3. Second voom pass, now informed by the donor correlation ─────────────────
vobj_trna <- voom(dge_trna, design_trna, plot = FALSE, block = colData(se_trna)$donor,
             correlation = dupcor_trna$consensus)

# ── 4. Second duplicateCorrelation pass on the better voom weights ─────────────
dupcor_trna <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_trna, design_trna, block = colData(se_trna)$donor)

# ── 5. Fit the linear model ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fit_trna <- lmFit(vobj_trna, design_trna, block=colData(se_trna)$donor, correlation = dupcor_trna$consensus)

contrast_trna <- makeContrasts(
  total_stress_vs_ctrl  = (groupstress_DMSO + groupstress_PROTAC)/2 - (groupctrl_DMSO + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2,
  DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl   = groupstress_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO,
  PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl = groupstress_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC,
  total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO  = (groupstress_PROTAC + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2 - (groupstress_DMSO + groupctrl_DMSO)/2,
  ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO   = groupctrl_PROTAC - groupctrl_DMSO,
  stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO = groupstress_PROTAC - groupstress_DMSO,
  interaction           = (groupstress_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC) - (groupstress_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO),
  levels = design_trna
)

fit2_trna <- contrasts.fit(fit_trna, contrast_trna)
fit2_trna <- eBayes(fit2_trna)  # Empirical Bayes smoothing of standard errors

# extract each contrast table 
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "total_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]
rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.interaction <- topTable(fit2_trna, coef = "interaction", n = Inf)[rownames(se_trna),]

table(rownames(se_trna)== rownames(vobj_trna$E))
assay(se_trna, "voom.val") <- vobj_trna$E

table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05)   # no
table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl$adj.P.Val<0.05) # no
table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05) # no
table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no
table(rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.interaction$adj.P.Val<0.05)  # no

```


```{r}

# protac effect
res_trna <- rowData(se_trna)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO
res_trna$tRNA <- basename(rownames(res_trna))
res_trna <- res_trna[order(res_trna$P.Value),]
sig_anno_trna <- rep("non", times = nrow(res_trna))
sig_anno_trna[which(res_trna$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & res_trna$logFC > 0)] <- "up"  # no ups
sig_anno_trna[which(res_trna$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & res_trna$logFC< 0)] <- "down"  # no downs

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

p_trna <- ggplot(
  res_trna,
  aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value))
) +
  geom_point(color = "grey") +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = head(res_trna, 3),
    aes(label = tRNA),
    max.overlaps = 20,
    size = 4
  ) +
  xlab("logFC") +
  ylab("-log10(P.value)") +
  labs(
    title = "Sperm tRNA (PROTAC vs. DMSO)"
  )+  theme(legend.position = "none",axis.text.x = element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=12),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14) 
    )

p_trna

ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_tRNA_totalPROTAC.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_tRNA_totalPROTAC.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5F_tRNA_totalPROTAC.png")
```

```{r}
tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end <- assay(se_trna, "corrected")[which(rownames(se_trna)=="GtRNAdb-mature-tRNA_3_end_Match_Genome/mature-tRNA-Gly-GCC_3_end"),]

df_tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end <- data.frame(
  sample = names(tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end),
  stress = ifelse(substr(names(tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end), 1, 1)=="C", "ctrl", "stress"),
  PROTAC = ifelse(substr(names(tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end), nchar(names(tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end)), nchar(names(tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end)))=="D", "DMSO", "PROTAC"),
  count = tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end
)

df_tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end$group <- factor(
  df_tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end$group,
  levels = c("ctrl_DMSO", "ctrl_PROTAC", "stress_DMSO", "stress_PROTAC"),
  labels= c("Control-DMSO","Control-KH103","Stress-DMSO","Stress-KH103")
)

box_tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end <- ggplot(data = df_tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end, aes(x = group, y = count, fill = group)) + geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7)+

  scale_fill_manual(values=c( "seashell2","seashell4","#ffa500ff","tomato3"))+
  labs(x = NULL, y = "corrected value",  title = "tRNA_Gly_GCC_3_end\ntop1 in KH-103 vs DMSO") +

  )
```

## Fig S5G KH-103 effect on stress affected GR binding long RNA (p < 0.01)

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/countMatrix_longRNA_sperm.SE.rds")
metadata(se)$anno_colors <- list(
  stress=c(ctrl="steelblue", ifs ="firebrick3"), 
  protac = c(PROTAC = "gray", DMSO = "navy"),
  group = c("ctrl_DMSO" = "seashell2", "ifs_DMSO" =  "#ffa500ff" , "ctrl_PROTAC" = "seashell4" , "ifs_PROTAC" = "tomato3"))

se$group <- factor(paste0(se$stress, "_", se$protac))

dge_for_filter <- DGEList(assay(se, "counts"))
dge_for_filter <- calcNormFactors(dge_for_filter)
design_for_filter <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se)))
# Filter using the temporary design matrix
keep <- filterByExpr(dge_for_filter, min.count = 20, design = design_for_filter)
se  <- se[keep, ]
# add donor info
colData(se)$donor <- sub("^(C[0-9]+|I[0-9]+)[DK]$", "\\1", colData(se)$sampleid)
colData(se)$donor <- factor(colData(se)$donor)

# voom
dge <- DGEList(assay(se, "counts"))
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group, data = as.data.frame(colData(se)))

# also calculate logcpm
assay(se, "logcpm") <- log1p(edgeR::cpm(dge)[rownames(se),])
```


```{r}
# ── 2. First voom + first duplicateCorrelation pass ───────────────────────────
vobj_for_dupcor <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE)
dupcor <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj_for_dupcor, design, block = colData(se)$donor)

# ── 3. Second voom pass, now informed by the donor correlation ─────────────────
vobj <- voom(dge, design, plot = FALSE,
             block       = colData(se)$donor,
             correlation = dupcor$consensus)

# ── 4. Second duplicateCorrelation pass on the better voom weights ─────────────
dupcor <- duplicateCorrelation(vobj, design, block = colData(se)$donor)

# ── 5. Fit the linear model ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fit <- lmFit(vobj, design, block=colData(se)$donor, correlation = dupcor$consensus)

contrast <- makeContrasts(
  total_stress_vs_ctrl  = (groupifs_DMSO + groupifs_PROTAC)/2 - (groupctrl_DMSO + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2,
  DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl   = groupifs_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO,
  PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl = groupifs_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC,
  total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO  = (groupifs_PROTAC + groupctrl_PROTAC)/2 - (groupifs_DMSO + groupctrl_DMSO)/2,
  ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO   = groupctrl_PROTAC - groupctrl_DMSO,
  stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO = groupifs_PROTAC - groupifs_DMSO,
  interaction           = (groupifs_PROTAC - groupctrl_PROTAC) - (groupifs_DMSO - groupctrl_DMSO),
  levels = design
)

fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)  # Empirical Bayes smoothing of standard errors

# extract each contrast table
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2, coef = "total_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2, coef = "DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl <- topTable(fit2, coef = "PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2, coef = "total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2, coef = "ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO <- topTable(fit2, coef = "stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]
rowData(se)$DEA.voom.interaction <- topTable(fit2, coef = "interaction", n = Inf)[rownames(se),]

```



```{r}
se_heatmap <- se[, order(se$protac, se$stress)]


semisig <- rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl[rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl$P.Value<0.01, ]
semisig2 <- rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO[rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO$P.Value<0.01, ]
```



```{r}
se <- log2FC(se, fromAssay = "logcpm", controls = se$protac == "DMSO", by = se$stress, isLog = TRUE)
cd <- as.data.frame(colData(se))
cd$scaledLFC <- colMeans(assay(se, "scaledLFC"))

mod <- lme4::lmer(scaledLFC ~ 0 + group + (1|donor), data = cd)
mod2 <- emmeans::emmeans(mod, ~ 0 + group)
cont <- makeContrasts(
      total_stress_vs_ctrl  = (ifs_DMSO + ifs_PROTAC)/2 - (ctrl_DMSO + ctrl_PROTAC)/2,
      DMSO_stress_vs_ctrl   = ifs_DMSO - ctrl_DMSO,
      PROTAC_stress_vs_ctrl = ifs_PROTAC - ctrl_PROTAC,
      total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO  = (ifs_PROTAC + ctrl_PROTAC)/2 - (ifs_DMSO + ctrl_DMSO)/2,
      ctrl_PROTAC_vs_DMSO   = ctrl_PROTAC - ctrl_DMSO,
      stress_PROTAC_vs_DMSO = ifs_PROTAC - ifs_DMSO,
      interaction           = (ifs_PROTAC - ctrl_PROTAC) - (ifs_DMSO - ctrl_DMSO),
      levels = levels(cd$group))

# contrast(mod2, as.list(as.data.frame(cont)))

# GR-binders: 
mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("objects/mmu_rip_gene_name.xlsx", colNames = FALSE) # this is the GR binding RNA list
GR_semisig <- intersect(rownames(semisig), mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge$X1) # 67
se_GR_semisig <- se[GR_semisig, ]
df_se_GR_semisig_logFC <- rowMeans(assay(se_GR_semisig, "log2FC")[,se_GR_semisig$protac=="PROTAC"])
n_down <- sum(df_se_GR_semisig_logFC<0)  # 60
N <- length(df_se_GR_semisig_logFC)  # 67

se_semisig <- se[rownames(semisig),]  # 952 genes
logFC_general <- rowMeans(assay(se_semisig, "log2FC")[,se_semisig$protac=="PROTAC"])
p_general <- sum(logFC_general<0)/length(logFC_general)
binom.test(n_down, N, p = p_general, alternative = "two.sided")

# to plot the heatmap, use the normalization to donor
se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap <- se_GR_semisig
se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap <- log2FC(se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap, fromAssay = "logcpm", controls = se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap$protac == "DMSO", by = se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap$donor, isLog = TRUE)


rowData(se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap)$direction <- ifelse(df_se_GR_semisig_logFC[rownames(se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap)]>0,yes = "up",no = "down")
# ========
sechm(
  se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap,
  names(df_se_GR_semisig_logFC),
  assayName = "scaledLFC",
  cluster_rows = F,
  top_annotation = c("stress", "protac"),
  hmcols =colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(101),
  gaps_at = c("protac"),gaps_row = "direction"
  )
# ==================

```

```{r}
sh <-  sechm(
  se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap[,se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap$protac == "PROTAC"],
   names(se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap),
  show_rownames = T,
  assayName = "scaledLFC",
  cluster_rows = F,
  sortRowsOn = colnames(se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap[,se_GR_semisig_for_heatmap$protac == "PROTAC"]),
  top_annotation = c("protac"),
  hmcols =colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(101),
  gaps_at = c("protac"),
  gaps_row = "direction",

 show_row_dend = FALSE,
 row_names_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 10)
 # do.sortRows=TRUE
  ) 

sh

pdf("sup_plots/FigS5G_longRNA_Heatmap_stresseaffected.pdf", width=8.0, height=9.0) #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()

png("sup_plots/FigS5G_longRNA_Heatmap_stresseaffected.png", height=650,width = 500,)

print(sh)
dev.off()

svg("sup_plots/FigS5G_longRNA_Heatmap_stresseaffected.svg", width=10, height=8.5) #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()
```


## Fig S5H correlation Plots


```{r}
mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("objects/mmu_rip_gene_name.xlsx", colNames = FALSE) # this is the GR binding RNA list
GRbindingRNA_sig <- intersect(mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge$X1, rownames(semisig))

GRbindingRNA_sig2 <- intersect(mmu_sig_rip_by_OmicsBridge$X1, rownames(semisig2))

e2c <- readRDS("objects/SummarizedExperimentObject_EmbryoFromIFS_Sperm_treatedKH103.SE.rds")
```



```{r}
res_e2c_protac <- rowData(e2c)$DEA.Total_PROTACvsDMSO
res_e2c_protac <- res_e2c_protac[!duplicated(sub(".*\\.", "", rownames(res_e2c_protac))),]
rownames(res_e2c_protac) <- sub(".*\\.", "", rownames(res_e2c_protac))

res_sperm_protac <- rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO


ov_protac <- GRbindingRNA_sig[GRbindingRNA_sig %in% rownames(res_e2c_protac)]  # 57 of them are expressed in the embryos

cor_protac <- data.frame(
  gene = ov_protac,
  embryo_logFC = res_e2c_protac[ov_protac, ]$logFC,
  sperm_logFC = res_sperm_protac[ov_protac, ]$logFC
)
```



```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(data = cor_protac, aes(x = embryo_logFC, y = sperm_logFC)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") + 
    # geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    labs(x="embryo logFC (KH-103 vs. DMSO)", 
         y="sperm logFC (KH-103 vs. DMSO)", 
         title = "correlation: sperm ~ embryo",
         subtitle = "gene set: sperm GR-binders with p<0.01 in stress effect") +
    stat_cor(method = "pearson",  
             label.x = min(cor_protac$embryo_logFC), # position of the label
             label.y = max(cor_protac$sperm_logFC)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=12),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
    )
p1
```



```{r}
res_e2c_stress <- rowData(e2c)$DEA.Total_IFSvsCTRL
res_e2c_stress <- res_e2c_stress[!duplicated(sub(".*\\.", "", rownames(res_e2c_stress))),]
rownames(res_e2c_stress) <- sub(".*\\.", "", rownames(res_e2c_stress))

res_sperm_stress <- rowData(se)$DEA.voom.total_stress_vs_ctrl


ov_stress <- GRbindingRNA_sig[GRbindingRNA_sig %in% rownames(res_e2c_stress)] 

cor_stress <- data.frame(
  gene = ov_stress,
  embryo_logFC = res_e2c_stress[ov_stress, ]$logFC,
  sperm_logFC = res_sperm_stress[ov_stress, ]$logFC
)
```



```{r}
p2 <- ggplot(data = cor_stress, aes(x = embryo_logFC, y = sperm_logFC)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
    labs(x="embryo logFC (Stress vs. Ctrl)", 
         y="sperm logFC (Stress vs. Ctrl)", 
         title = "correlation: sperm ~ embryo",
         subtitle = "gene set: sperm GR-binders with p<0.01 in stress effect") +
    stat_cor(method = "pearson",  
             label.x = min(cor_stress$embryo_logFC), # position of the label
             label.y = max(cor_stress$sperm_logFC)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=14),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
          legend.text = element_text(size=12),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
    )
p2
```

## Fig S5I Heatmap of differential expressed genes in 2-cell embryos by IFS fathers


```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/IFS_smartSeq_embryo_salmon.SE.rds")
meta <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("objects/IFS_smartSeq_embryo_meta.xlsx",colNames = T) 
meta <- meta[order(meta$Sample),]
meta <- meta[meta$Sample %in% colnames(se),]
table(meta$Sample == colnames(se))
se$embryos <- as.factor(meta$embryos)

Group <- factor(paste(se$treatment,se$condition,sep="."))


se$Group <- Group

set.seed(123)
se$Group2 <- sample(Group,size = 17,replace = F)
colData(se)
meta$Sample
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
se <- SEtools::svacor(se, ~Group+embryos,form0 = ~embryos, n.sv = 3)

```

```{r}
dds <- calcNormFactors(DGEList(assay(se))) # this calculates Normalization factors according to library sequencing depth, this is important since depth can vary greatly between samples

### lets look at the library size
dds$samples



assays(se)$logcpm <- log1p(edgeR::cpm(dds)) # generates the log of Counts-per-million (CPM), this is a very standardized way to normalize data used then for analysis or visualisation




mm <- model.matrix(~0+Group+SV1+SV2+embryos, data=as.data.frame(colData(se))); mm


dds <- dds[filterByExpr(dds, group = Group, min.count=20),] # 20 maybe to stringent for embryo data
dds <- estimateDisp(dds,design = mm)
se <- se[row.names(dds),]

fit <- glmFit(dds, mm, prior.count = 5) # we us prior.count 5 since we are working with low count data
```
Creating contrasts
```{r}
fit$design

my.contrast <- makeContrasts(
  DMSO_IFSvsCTRL = GroupDMSO.IFS - GroupDMSO.CTRL ,
  PROTAC_IFSvsCTRL = GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupPROTAC.CTRL,
  IFS_PROTACvsDMSO = GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupDMSO.IFS,
  CTRL_PROTACvsDMSO = GroupPROTAC.CTRL - GroupDMSO.CTRL,
  IFS_PROTAC_int = ((GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupPROTAC.CTRL) - (GroupDMSO.IFS - GroupDMSO.CTRL)), # interaction term

  Total_IFSvsCTRL = (GroupDMSO.IFS - GroupDMSO.CTRL + GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupPROTAC.CTRL)/2,
  Total_PROTACvsDMSO =  (GroupPROTAC.IFS - GroupDMSO.IFS + GroupPROTAC.CTRL - GroupDMSO.CTRL)/2,
  levels = mm
)
my.contrast  

```


```{r}
Results <- list()
 
for (con in colnames(my.contrast)){
  Results[[con]] <- as.data.frame(topTags(glmLRT(fit,contrast = my.contrast[,con]),Inf))
  Results[[con]]$ID <- gsub(x = rownames(Results[[con]]),pattern = "ENS(.*)\\.",replacement = "")
  Results[[con]]$DEA <- con
}
Results
# write.csv(Results$DMSO_IFSvsCTRL$ID[Results$DMSO_IFSvsCTRL$FDR < 0.05],"trial.csv")
```
```{r}
se <- log2FC(se, fromAssay = "corrected",controls = se$condition == "CTRL",isLog = F,by = se$treatment)#
```
```{r}
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "black", "orange"))(101)
rownames(se) <- gsub(x = rownames(se),pattern = "^ENS(.*)\\.",replacement = "")



sh <- sechm(se,features = Results$Total_IFSvsCTRL$ID[Results$Total_IFSvsCTRL$FDR <0.05],assayName = "scaledLFC",hmcols = color_palette,do.scale =F,gaps_at = c("treatment"),column_order = colnames(se)[order(colData(se)$condition)],show_rownames = F,name = paste0("StressGenes","\nlog2FC"),top_annotation = c("Group"),use_raster = T,column_title = "Stress effect in 2-cell embryos\nupon parternal stress and sperm treatment",column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20)) 
print(sh)



pdf("sup_plots/FigS5I.StressGenes.heatmap.pdf", width=14.5, height=10) #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()

png("sup_plots/FigS5I.StressGenes.heatmap.png", height=516,width = 758,)

print(sh)
dev.off()

svg("sup_plots/FigS5I.StressGenes.heatmap.svg") #, width=14.5, height=10)

print(sh)
dev.off()

```


```{r}
library(scales)
dea <- Results$Total_IFSvsCTRL


xlim <- c(-7, 7)
ylim <- c(0,8)

# Function to generate volcano plots
generate_volcano_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df$highlight <- df$FDR < 0.01
  df$extreme[df$logFC > xlim[2] | df$logFC < xlim[1] | -log10(df$FDR) > ylim[2] | -log10(df$FDR) < ylim[1]] <- "extreme"
  df$highlight[df$extreme == "extreme"] <- "extreme"
  top_genes <- df[order(df$FDR), ][1:20, ]
  ggplot(df, aes(x=logFC, y=-log10(FDR))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "orange", "FALSE" = "black", "extreme" = "firebrick3")) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(top_genes, highlight == TRUE | highlight == "extreme"), aes(label=ID), size=4, min.segment.length = 0, max.overlaps = Inf, nudge_y = 0.1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed")+
    xlab("logFC") +
    ylab("-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    # theme_classic() +
  
    scale_x_continuous(limits = xlim, oob = squish) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = ylim, oob = squish) +
    ggtitle(title)+
    theme(
  text       = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.text  = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
  plot.title = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.position = "none"
)
}

# Apply the function to each dataframe in the list
generate_volcano_plot(dea, "Differentially expressed genes in Stress vs Ctrl 2-cell embryos")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5I_DEGs_TotalStressVsCtrl.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5I_DEGs_TotalStressVsCtrl.pdf")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5I_DEGs_TotalStressVsCtrl.png")
```

```{r}
tx <- GenomeInfoDb::keepStandardChromosomes(tx,pruning.mode = "coarse")
```

## Fig S5K GO:BP 2-cell embryos of paternal stress




```{r}
set.seed(312)
Results_geo_uni <- list()
 
for (i in 1:length(colnames(my.contrast)[1])){
  dea <- Results[[i]]  
  gene_list <- dea[dea$FDR <= 0.05,]$ID # this get us all significantly differential expressed genes
kegg <- enrichGO(gene          = gene_list,
                OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
                keyType       = "SYMBOL",
                ont           = "BP",  # BP: Biological Process, MF: Molecular Function, CC: Cellular Component
                pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                pvalueCutoff  = 1,
                qvalueCutoff  = 1,
                 universe = dea$ID
                    )

  
  
  
  d <- dotplot(kegg, showCategory=10)

}
print(d)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5K.2cellGOBPDMSOvsIFS.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5K.2cellGOBPDMSOvsIFS.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS5K.2cellGOBPDMSOvsIFS.png")

```

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/se_HPP_offspring_with_DEA_result.rds")
results_DMSO_stressSex_int <-rowData(se)$DEA.DMSO_interaction_between_sex_n_stress
table(results_DMSO_stressSex_int$FDR < 0.05)

colData(se)
dea <- getDEA(se)
for (i in 1:length(dea)){
  dea[[i]]$DEA <- names(dea)[i]
  dea[[i]]$Gene <- rownames(dea[[i]])
}
dea.combined <- dplyr::bind_rows(dea,.id = "DEA")
dea.combined <- dea.combined[,c(1:7)]

dea.Nrn1 <- dea.combined[grep(pattern = "Nrn1",x = dea.combined$Gene),]

openxlsx::write.xlsx(dea.Nrn1,file = "dea.Nrn1.xlsx")


dea.Fkbp5 <- dea.combined[grep(pattern = "Fkbp5",x = dea.combined$Gene),]

openxlsx::write.xlsx(dea.Fkbp5,file = "dea.Fkbp5.xlsx")
```

# Fig 6C Nrn1 in offspring HPP

```{r}
df <- as.data.frame(cbind(colData(se),t(assays(se)$logcpm)))
colnames(df) <- gsub(pattern = "^ENSMUS(.*)\\.",replacement = "",x = colnames(df))
df <- df[,!duplicated(colnames(df))]
df$condition <- as.character(df$condition)
df$condition <- factor(df$condition, levels = c("ctrl_DMSO","stress_DMSO","ctrl_PROTAC","stress_PROTAC"))
df$sex <- factor(df$sex, levels = c("f","m"))
```



```{r}
gene <- "Nrn1"
  # Calculate range and breaks
  y_min <- (min(df[[gene]]))
  y_max <- (max(df[[gene]]))
  y_breaks <- seq(y_min, y_max+0.1, length.out = 4)
  
  # Round to nearest 0.5
  round_to_half <- function(x) round(x * 2,digits = 1) / 2
  y_breaks <- round_to_half(y_breaks)
  
  # Adjust limits to match rounded breaks
  y_lim <- range(y_breaks)
  
  
  
  e <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sex, y = df[[gene]], fill = condition))
  
  
   e2 <- e + geom_boxplot(width = 0.75,outlier.shape = NA ) + 
     geom_jitter(
     position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75)
      )+
  
     ylab("logcpm")+
     xlab("Groups")+
     ggtitle(paste0("HPP: ",gene," expression"))+
  
     
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_breaks, limits = y_lim) +
  
  
     scale_fill_manual(values=c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3"))+
     labs(fill= "Condition")+
  
   theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
    text = element_text(size = 14), 
  )
   
   
   print(e2)
  
  
ggsave("plots/Fig6C_Nrn1_offspring.svg")
ggsave("plots/Fig6C_Nrn1_offspring.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("plots/Fig6C_Nrn1_offspring.png")


```

# Fig 6E CortResponse Offspring
load data


```{r}
df <- read.csv("objects/CortOffspring.csv")

```


```{r}
df$plate <- as.factor(df$plate)
df$sex <- as.factor(df$sex)
df$stress <- as.factor(df$stress)
df$animal_id <- as.factor(df$animal_id)
df$time_min <- as.factor(df$time_min) # potentially need to be used as factor since it is not complitly linear
```

```{r}

fit <- lmer(data = df,formula = corticosterone ~ stress*treatment+time_min+sex  +(1|animal_id)+(1|plate))
summary(fit)
anova(fit, type = 3)

```


```{r}

df$Group <- interaction(df$stress,df$treatment)
df$Group <- as.factor(gsub(x = df$Group,pattern = "-",replacement = "."))
table(df$Group)
```


```{r}
design <- model.matrix(~0 + Group +time_min, data = df)


```

```{r}
my.contrasts <- makeContrasts(

Stress_DMSO_all =

    Groupstressed.DMSO   -Groupnon.stressed.DMSO
,


Stress_PROTAC_all =

    Groupstressed.PROTAC  - Groupnon.stressed.PROTAC   
,




Treatment_nonstressed_all =

    Groupnon.stressed.PROTAC  - Groupnon.stressed.DMSO
,


Treatment_stressed_all =

    Groupstressed.PROTAC  - Groupstressed.DMSO  
,



levels = design
)
```


```{r}

df$Group <- gsub(x = df$Group,pattern = "-",replacement = ".")
df$Group <- as.factor(df$Group)
contrast_names <- rownames(t(my.contrast))


results <- lapply(contrast_names, function(x) data.frame())
names(results) <- contrast_names
results_cov <- list()


    fit <- lmer(data = df,formula = corticosterone ~ 0+Group  +time_min+(1|animal_id)+(1|plate))


    glht_result <- glht(fit,linfct = t(my.contrasts))
    summary_glht <- summary(glht_result,test = adjusted("holm"))
```

```{r}
df$Group <- as.factor(gsub(pattern = " ",replacement = ".",x = df$Group))
df$CageBatch <- interaction(df$Cage,df$Batch)

df$HomeCageID <- as.factor(df$HomeCageID)
df$Batch <- as.factor(df$Batch)
df$TimePoint <- as.factor(df$TimePoint)

library(tidyr)

  separate(Group, into = c("Condition", "Treatment"), sep = "\\.", remove = FALSE,extra = "merge")


df$Group2 <- interaction(df$Condition,df$Treatment,df$Sex)
df$Group2 <- gsub(pattern = "-",replacement = ".",x = df$Group2)
df$Group2 <- gsub(pattern = "females",replacement = "f",x = df$Group2)
df$Group2 <- gsub(pattern = "males",replacement = "m",x = df$Group2)
```

```{r}
             #, Extract condition labels as factor
design <- model.matrix( ~ 0+ Group2 + Size + Batch ,data = dt_tp13.1)  #+ (1|CageBatch)  +TimePoint    #, Create design matrix without intercept (each group is a separate column)

colnames(design) <- gsub(x = colnames(design), pattern = "Group2",replacement = "" )          #, Name columns using condition labels [-length(colnames(design))]
                 #, Set row names to match sample IDs
                           #, Display design matrix for inspection


my.contrast <- limma::makeContrasts(
                                 m_stressVSnon_stressed_DMSO          = stressed.DMSO.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m,
                                 m_stressVSnon_stressed_PROTAC          = stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.m,
                                 m_stressVSnon_stressed_total          = (stressed.DMSO.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m + stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.m)/2,
                                 m_PROTACvsDMSO_stressed = stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m,
                                 m_PROTACvsDMSO_non_stressed = non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m,
                                 m_PROTACvsDMSO_total = (stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m + non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m)/2,
                                 
                                 #female
                                 f_stressVSnon_stressed_DMSO          = stressed.DMSO.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f,
                                 f_stressVSnon_stressed_PROTAC          = stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.PROTAC.f,
                                 f_stressVSnon_stressed_total          = (stressed.DMSO.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f + stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.PROTAC.f)/2,
                                 f_PROTACvsDMSO_stressed = stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f,
                                 f_PROTACvsDMSO_non_stressed = non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f,
                                 f_PROTACvsDMSO_total = (stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f + non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f)/2,
                                                                 
                                 # sex effect - only total
                          
                                mVSf_total = (
  (stressed.DMSO.m + non.stressed.DMSO.m + stressed.PROTAC.m + non.stressed.PROTAC.m) -
  (stressed.DMSO.f + non.stressed.DMSO.f + stressed.PROTAC.f + non.stressed.PROTAC.f)
) / 4
,
    
                                 mf_stressVSnon_stressed_DMSO          = (stressed.DMSO.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m +stressed.DMSO.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f)/2,
                                 mf_stressVSnon_stressed_PROTAC          = (stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.m + stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.PROTAC.f)/2,
                                 mf_stressVSnon_stressed_total          = (stressed.DMSO.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m + stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.m + stressed.DMSO.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f + stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.PROTAC.f)/4,
                                 mf_PROTACvsDMSO_stressed = (stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m+stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f)/2 ,
                                 mf_PROTACvsDMSO_non_stressed = (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m + non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f)/2,
                                 mf_PROTACvsDMSO_total = (stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m + non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m + stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f + non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f)/4,
                                 
                                 
                                 # Interaction
                                 ## 3way
                                 Int_Stress_Protac_Sex = ((stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m)) -((stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f)),
                                 
                                 ##2way 
                                 m_Int_Stress_Protac = (stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m),
                                 f_Int_Stress_Protac = (stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f),
                                 mf_Int_Stress_Protac = (((stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m)) + ((stressed.PROTAC.f - stressed.DMSO.f) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.f - non.stressed.DMSO.f)))/2, 
                                 PROTAC_Int_Stress_Sex =(stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.PROTAC.f) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.f),
                                 DMSO_Int_Stress_Sex =(stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m),
                                 Total_Int_Stress_Sex =(((stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.PROTAC.f) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.f))+((stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.DMSO.m) - (non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.DMSO.m)))/2,
                                 Stress_Int_Protac_Sex =(stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.PROTAC.f) - (stressed.DMSO.m - stressed.DMSO.f),
                                 NonStress_Int_Protac_Sex =(non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.f) - (non.stressed.DMSO.m - non.stressed.DMSO.f),
                                 Total_Int_Protac_Sex =(((stressed.PROTAC.m - stressed.PROTAC.f) - (stressed.DMSO.m - stressed.DMSO.f))+((non.stressed.PROTAC.m - non.stressed.PROTAC.f) - (non.stressed.DMSO.m - non.stressed.DMSO.f)))/2,
                                
                                 levels = design)
 # CRS_Sex_int = ((Group_Conditionf.CRS - Group_Conditionf.Ctrl) - (Group_Conditionm.CRS  - Group_Conditionm.Ctrl)), # interaction term
```

# Fig 6J Perm_Trans_Females_SvsCinDMSO

```{r}
plotTransVF <- function(us, analysis = NULL, labels = NULL, title = NULL){
  require(ggplot2)
  require(cowplot)
  if(is.null(analysis)){
    analysis <- names(us$Results)
  }
  if(is.null(labels)){
    for(i in analysis){
      labels <- unique(c(labels, names(us$Results[[i]]$TransitionStats)))
    }
  }
  
  ps <- list()
  for(i in analysis){
    for(j in labels[labels %in% names(us$Results[[i]]$TransitionStats)]){
      bdat <- data.frame(distance = us$Results[[i]]$TransitionStats[[j]]$bootstraps)
      dis <- us$Results[[i]]$TransitionStats[[j]]$distance
      sigma <- us$Results[[i]]$TransitionStats[[j]]$sigma
      percentile <- us$Results[[i]]$TransitionStats[[j]]$percentile
      p1 <- ggplot(bdat,aes(distance)) + 
        geom_histogram(color = "black", fill = "gray70", bins = 30) + 
        geom_vline(xintercept = dis, color = "orange") +
        ylab("Frequency")+
        xlab("Manhattan Distance")+
        ggtitle(title)+

annotate("label",
         x = Inf, y = Inf,
         label = paste0("percentile: ", signif(percentile, 4), "\n",
                        "sigma: ", round(sigma, 2), "\n",
                        "p.value: ", signif((1 - pracma::erf(sigma / sqrt(2))) / 2, 3)),
         hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.1,         # nudges inward from top-right
         size =5,                        # larger text
         label.size = 0.5,                  # thicker border
         fill = "white",                    # background color
         color = "black",                   # text color
         fontface = "plain",                # normal weight
         family = "Helvetica",                  # optional: use serif font
         lineheight = 1.1                   # spacing between lines
)

    ps[[paste(i,j, sep = "-")]] <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1, nrow = 1,rel_widths = c(1))
        
     
    }
  }
  cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = ps, ncol = 1)
}
```

## Fig S6A offspring hippocampus transcriptome GSEA
```{r}
dir_path <- "objects/"
files <- list.files(path = dir_path, pattern = "^fgsea_.*", full.names = TRUE)


```


```{r}
  
get_top_table <- function(pattern = NULL, filelist, top_num){ 
  library(purrr)
  library(dplyr)

    # the pattern should be the the pattern of the pathway names that we want to extract
    # for example "C5:GP:BP"
    # top_num: how many top terms we extract from each contrast
    if (is.null(pattern)){
        top_list <- map_dfr(filelist, function(fpath) {
        df <- readRDS(fpath)
        df <- df[order(df$pval), ]
        df_top <- head(df, top_num)  # now choose top5 otherwise too many terms
        fname <- basename(fpath)
        label <- gsub("^fgsea_", "", fname)
        df_top %>%
            mutate(source_file = fname,
                source = label,
                .before = 1)  # put source in column1
    })
    }
    else {
        top_list <- map_dfr(filelist, function(fpath) {
        df <- readRDS(fpath)
        df <- df[order(df$pval), ]
        df_top <- head(df[grepl(pattern, df$pathway),], top_num)  # extract the terms
        fname <- basename(fpath)
        label <- gsub("^fgsea_", "", fname)
        df_top %>%
            mutate(source_file = fname,
                source = label,
                .before = 1)  # put source at column1
})
    }

    top_path <- unique(top_list$pathway)
    fgsea_combine <- map_dfr(filelist, function(f){
        df <- readRDS(f)
        matched <- df %>% dplyr::filter(pathway %in% top_path)
        matched %>%
            mutate(
                label = gsub("^fgsea_", "", basename(f)),
                .before = 1)
    })

    fgsea_combine$label <- gsub("\\.rds$", "", fgsea_combine$label)
    
    return(fgsea_combine)
}
```



```{r}
fgsea_combine_GOBP <- get_top_table(pattern = "C5:GO:BP", filelist = files, top_num = 10)
fgsea_combine_GOBP$label <- factor(fgsea_combine_GOBP$label, levels = c(
        "total_stress_vs_ctrl", "total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", "DMSO_interaction_between_sex_n_stress", "PROTAC_interaction_between_sex_n_stress"
    ))
```


```{r}
get_cluster <- function(maxK, fgsea_table){ # the function will decide the cluster number by itself (silhouette)
    # First: create a pathway x label matrix, the values are NES (we do the cluster based on NES)
    mat_df <- fgsea_table %>%
        dplyr::select(label, pathway, NES) %>%   
        pivot_wider(names_from = label, values_from = NES)
    mat <- as.matrix(mat_df %>% dplyr::select(-pathway))
    rownames(mat) <- mat_df$pathway

    # Second: compute the distance
    # Pearson correlation distance (1 - correlation): measures similarity in patterns, ignoring magnitude
    # Euclidean distance: measures absolute numeric differneces (magnitude)
    # here we care about the pattern across contrast groups, so we use the pearson correlation
    dist_mat <- as.dist(1 - cor(t(mat)))

    # Third: compute hierarchical clustering
    hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "ward.D2")  # ward.D2: join clusters that cause the smallest increase in within-cluster variance. good for forming compact balanced clusters from continuous data 

    # Fouth: use silhouette to check how many clusters are the best
    avg_sil <- numeric(maxK) 
    for(k in 3:maxK){  
        cl <- cutree(hc, k= k)
        sil <- cluster::silhouette(cl, dist_mat)
        avg_sil[k] <- mean(sil[,3])
    }
    best_k_sil <- which.max(avg_sil)

    plot(3:maxK, avg_sil[3:maxK], type="b", xlab="k", ylab="Average silhouette", pch=19)
    cat("Best k by silhouette =", best_k_sil, ", avg silhouette =", avg_sil[best_k_sil], "\n")

    pathway_order <- hc$labels[hc$order]
    clusters <- cutree(hc, k = best_k_sil)
    cluster_df <- tibble(pathway = names(clusters), cluster = as.factor(clusters))

    # Put the cluster result into the original table
    fgsea_clustered <- fgsea_table %>%
        left_join(cluster_df, by = "pathway") %>%
        mutate(pathway = factor(pathway, levels = pathway_order))

    return(fgsea_clustered)
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered <- get_cluster(maxK = 5, fgsea_table = fgsea_combine_GOBP)
cluster_bar_combine_GOBP_clustered <- fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered %>% distinct(pathway, cluster)

```



```{r}
fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered$pathway <- gsub(pattern = "C5:GO:BP:GOBP_",replacement = "",x =fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered$pathway )
cluster_bar_combine_GOBP_clustered$pathway<- gsub(pattern = "C5:GO:BP:GOBP_",replacement = "",x =cluster_bar_combine_GOBP_clustered$pathway)


```
```{r}
fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered$label <- factor(
  fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered$label,
  levels = c("total_stress_vs_ctrl", "total_PROTAC_vs_DMSO", "DMSO_interaction_between_sex_n_stress", "PROTAC_interaction_between_sex_n_stress"),
  labels= c("Stress vs Ctrl","KH-103 vs DMSO","Ineraction Stress:Sex (DMSO)","Ineraction Stress:Sex (KH-103)")
)
```


```{r,fig.width=20}
p_combine_GOBP_clustered_with_shape <- ggplot(fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered, aes(x = label, y = pathway, color = NES, size = -log10(padj), shape = padj<0.05)) +
    geom_point() +
    theme_minimal() +
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "red", mid="grey") +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 8)) +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 14),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")
    ) +
    labs(title = "GSEA of GO:BP in offspring hippocampus transcriptome comparisons")+
    xlab(NULL)+
    # label the clusters
    geom_text(data = fgsea_combine_GOBP_clustered %>% dplyr::filter(!duplicated(pathway)),
        aes(x = -Inf, y = pathway, label = cluster),
        inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    facet_grid(cluster ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +  # to make a little gap between clusters
    geom_tile(data = cluster_bar_combine_GOBP_clustered,  #REMEMBER TO CHANGE
            aes(x = -0.5, y = pathway, fill = cluster),
            width = 0.3, height = 0.8,
            inherit.aes = FALSE)+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
  )

p_combine_GOBP_clustered_with_shape

ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6A_GSEA_Offspring_HPP.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6A_GSEA_Offspring_HPP.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6A_GSEA_Offspring_HPP.png")

```

## Fig S6B Cort offspring all groups
load data


```{r}
df <- read.csv("objects/CortOffspring.csv")

```


```{r}
df$plate <- as.factor(df$plate)
df$sex <- as.factor(df$sex)
df$stress <- as.factor(df$stress)
df$animal_id <- as.factor(df$animal_id)
df$time_min <- as.factor(df$time_min) # potentially need to be used as factor since it is not complitly linear
```

```{r}

fit <- lmer(data = df,formula = corticosterone ~ stress*treatment+time_min+sex  +(1|animal_id)+(1|plate))
summary(fit)
anova(fit, type = 3)

```


```{r}

df$Group <- interaction(df$stress,df$treatment)
df$Group <- as.factor(gsub(x = df$Group,pattern = "-",replacement = "."))
table(df$Group)
```


```{r}
design <- model.matrix(~0 + Group +time_min, data = df)


```

```{r}
my.contrasts <- makeContrasts(

Stress_DMSO_all =

    Groupstressed.DMSO   -Groupnon.stressed.DMSO
,


Stress_PROTAC_all =

    Groupstressed.PROTAC  - Groupnon.stressed.PROTAC   
,




Treatment_nonstressed_all =

    Groupnon.stressed.PROTAC  - Groupnon.stressed.DMSO
,


Treatment_stressed_all =

    Groupstressed.PROTAC  - Groupstressed.DMSO  
,



levels = design
)
```


```{r}
library(multcomp)
df$Group <- gsub(x = df$Group,pattern = "-",replacement = ".")
df$Group <- as.factor(df$Group)
contrast_names <- rownames(t(my.contrast))


results <- lapply(contrast_names, function(x) data.frame())
names(results) <- contrast_names
results_cov <- list()


    fit <- lmer(data = df,formula = corticosterone ~ 0+Group  +time_min+(1|animal_id)+(1|plate))


    glht_result <- glht(fit,linfct = t(my.contrasts))
    summary_glht <- summary(glht_result,test = adjusted("holm"))
    
    

```


```{r}

df$Group3 <- interaction(df$stress,df$treatment) # for plotting
```


```{r}
df2 <- df

df2$x_pos <- as.numeric(as.character(df2$time))

df2$x_pos[df2$time == "180"] <- 60


library(ggplot2)

gg <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = x_pos,
               y = corticosterone,
               color = Group3,
               group = Group3)) +
  
  # mean line
  stat_summary(fun = mean,
               geom = "line",
               size = 1) +
  
  # points at each timepoint (mean)
  stat_summary(fun = mean,
               geom = "point",
               size = 3) +
  
  # error bars: mean ± SEM
  stat_summary(
    fun.data = mean_se,   # mean ± standard error
    geom = "errorbar",
    width = 2,
    # linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3"))+ #  scale_color_manual(values=c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3"))+
  
 scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 15, 30, 60),
    labels = c("0", "15", "30", "120")
  ) +

 labs(color= NULL)+
  theme_bw() +
   theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
  text = element_text(size = 14),  
)+
 
  labs(
    x = "Time [min]",
    y = "Cort [ng/ml]",
    title = "Cort Response in offspring of stressed fathers"
   )

print(gg)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6BCortResponse.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6BCortResponse.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6BCortResponse.png")
  
```

```{r}
behavior <- "tic1"
  # Calculate range and breaks
  y_min <- (min(df[[behavior]]))
  y_max <- (max(df[[behavior]]))
  y_breaks <- seq(90, 240, length.out = 4)
  
  # Round to nearest 0.5
  # round_to_half <- function(x) round(x * 2,digits = 1) / 2
  # y_breaks <- round_to_half(y_breaks)
  # 
  # Adjust limits to match rounded breaks
  y_lim <- range(y_breaks)
  
  
  
  e <- ggplot(df, aes(x = condition, y = df[[behavior]], fill = condition))
  
  
   e2 <- e + geom_boxplot(width = 0.75,outlier.shape = NA ) + 
     geom_jitter(
     position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75)
      )+
  
     ylab("Time [s]")+
     xlab("Groups")+
     ggtitle(paste0("Time in Center"))+
  
     
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_breaks, limits = y_lim) +
  
  
     scale_fill_manual(values=c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3"))+
     labs(fill= "Condition")+
  
   theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size =7.5),
    text = element_text(size = 14), 
  )
   
   
   print(e2)
```

```{r}
behavior <- "bodycentre.dark.total.time"
  # Calculate range and breaks
  y_min <- (min(df[[behavior]]));y_min
  y_max <- (max(df[[behavior]]));y_max
  y_breaks <- seq(175, 475, length.out = 4)
  
  # Round to nearest 0.5
  # round_to_half <- function(x) round(x * 2,digits = 1) / 2
  # y_breaks <- round_to_half(y_breaks)
  # 
  # Adjust limits to match rounded breaks
  y_lim <- range(y_breaks)
  
  
  
  e <- ggplot(df, aes(x = condition, y = df[[behavior]], fill = condition))
  
  
   e2 <- e + geom_boxplot(width = 0.75,outlier.shape = NA ) + 
     geom_jitter(
     position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75)
      )+
  
     ylab("Time [s]")+
     xlab("Groups")+
     ggtitle(paste0("LDB: Time in Dark"))+
  
     
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_breaks, limits = y_lim) +
  
  
     scale_fill_manual(values=c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3"))+
     labs(fill= "Condition")+
  
   theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7.5),
    text = element_text(size = 14), 
  )
   
   
   print(e2)
  
  
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6H_LDB_TID_merge_offspring.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6H_LDB_TID_merge_offspring.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6H_LDB_TID_merge_offspring.png")


```

## Fig S6I LDB behavior split by sex
read in behavior data
```{r}
df <- readRDS("objects/LDB_readout.rds")
df$bodycentre.distance.moving
```


```{r}
behavior <- "bodycentre.distance.moving"
  # Calculate range and breaks
  y_min <- (min(df[[behavior]]));y_min
  y_max <- (max(df[[behavior]]));y_max
  y_breaks <- seq(2000, 6500, length.out = 4)
  
  # Round to nearest 0.5
  # round_to_half <- function(x) round(x * 2,digits = 1) / 2
  # y_breaks <- round_to_half(y_breaks)
  # 
  # Adjust limits to match rounded breaks
  y_lim <- range(y_breaks)
  
  
  
  e <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sex, y = df[[behavior]], fill = condition))
  
  
   e2 <- e + geom_boxplot(width = 0.75,outlier.shape = NA ) + 
     geom_jitter(
     position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.1, dodge.width = 0.75)
      )+
  
     ylab("Distance [cm]")+
     xlab("Groups")+
     ggtitle(paste0("LDB: Distance Covered"))+
  
     
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_breaks, limits = y_lim) +
  
  
     scale_fill_manual(values=c( "seashell2","#ffa500ff","seashell4","tomato3"))+
     labs(fill= "Condition")+
  
   theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
    text = element_text(size = 14), 
  )
   
   
   print(e2)
  
  
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6I_LDB_DistanceCovered_offspring.svg")
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6I_LDB_DistanceCovered_offspring.pdf")#, width = 6, height = 4)
ggsave("sup_plots/FigS6I_LDB_DistanceCovered_offspring.png")
```
